title: Full-Time Podcast Manager
description:
Job Title: Full-Time Podcast and Social Media Manager



Company Overview:

We are a fast-growing agency that empowers entrepreneurs to achieve their goals and enhance their visibility through impactful content creation. Our mission includes producing and managing high-quality podcast content and leveraging social media strategies to engage audiences, build brand authority, and drive growth.



Position Overview:

We are seeking an experienced Podcast and Social Media Manager to oversee and manage multiple podcasts while driving social media marketing efforts. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record in podcast production, social media management, guest coordination, and content promotion. This is a full-time role that requires excellent organizational skills, creativity, and the ability to handle the unique needs of various clients.



Key Responsibilities:



Podcast Management:

• Manage all aspects of podcast production for multiple shows, ensuring timely and high-quality delivery.

• Coordinate guest interviews, including outreach, scheduling, and preparing guests for their appearances.

• Develop and manage production schedules, ensuring deadlines are consistently met.

• Create and oversee workflows to streamline podcast operations and optimize efficiency.

• Collaborate with editors and content creators to produce engaging audio and video content.

• Write and edit show notes, titles, and descriptions for each episode.

• Distribute episodes across podcast platforms (e.g., Spotify, Apple Podcasts) and track performance metrics.

• Monitor analytics and provide clients with regular reports on podcast performance.

• Stay updated on podcasting trends, tools, and industry best practices to ensure competitive positioning.



Social Media Management:

• Develop and execute social media strategies to promote podcast episodes and other related content.

• Create and schedule posts on platforms like Instagram, LinkedIn,
, TikTok, and
.

• Edit and repurpose podcast content into engaging social media clips and graphics.

• Use tools like CapCut, Canva, or Descript to optimize and streamline social media content creation.

• Engage with followers, respond to comments, and foster online communities around podcast brands.

• Monitor social media analytics to measure campaign performance and optimize strategies for better engagement and reach.



Additional Responsibilities:

• Coordinate with marketing teams to align podcast and social media strategies with broader client goals.

• Assist in advertising and sponsorship outreach for podcast monetization opportunities.

• Conduct market and competition analysis to identify trends and new opportunities in podcasting and social media.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience managing multiple podcasts or similar content projects.

• Strong understanding of podcast platforms, workflows, and best practices.

• Solid experience in social media management and marketing, including analytics and campaign optimization.

• Familiarity with social media platforms and tools such as Hootsuite, Buffer, or Sprout Social.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills for guest coordination and audience engagement.

• Proficiency in podcast editing software (e.g., Audacity, Adobe Audition) and social media content creation tools.

• Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment while maintaining high attention to detail.



Preferred Qualifications:

• Experience with video podcasting and SEO optimization for podcast episodes and promotional materials.

• Knowledge of automation tools like Zapier and CRM platforms.

• Familiarity with paid social media advertising strategies.



What We Offer:

• Flexible remote working environment.

• Opportunities for professional growth and development.

• Collaborative and supportive team culture.

• Competitive compensation based on experience



Application Requirements:

To apply for this position, candidates MUST complete all three steps below:

1. Submit a resume outlining your experience.

2. Provide a portfolio showcasing podcasts and social media projects you’ve managed.

3. Submit a link to a newly created video introduction where you:

• State the current date (to verify it’s a new video).

• Explain why you are the perfect fit for this role.

• Highlight relevant projects you’ve completed and your approach to podcast management and social media marketing.

• Showcase examples of your work or workflows if possible.



Please Note:

• Do not apply if you do not complete all three requirements as described above.

• Old video introductions or videos that do not include all required components will NOT be considered.

• Applications submitted directly on other platforms will not be considered.



How to Apply:

Submit your application via this link: 



We are excited to review your application and see how your expertise can elevate our podcast and social media content to new heights!

title: N8N Systems Operator (Part-Time)
description:
We are looking for an N8N Systems Operator who has real experience setting up, launching, and maintaining a self hosted N8N environment. This role requires confidence with VPS hosting, installation, updates, integrations, and workflow troubleshooting. You will be responsible for managing system performance, automations, and backend connections across our tech stack.



You will also assist with automation tasks inside Go High Level, Apollo, Instantly, Calendly, Notion, and ClickUp. You can work your normal schedule, however some overlap for occasional USA based meetings is helpful.



Key Responsibilities

• Set up and launch a self hosted N8N instance on a VPS

• Configure domains, SSL, environment variables, and security settings

• Maintain updates, version control, and system reliability

• Build and troubleshoot automation workflows inside N8N

• Connect platforms using APIs, webhooks, and integration logic

• Assist with Go High Level workflows and automation settings

• Support Apollo, Instantly, and Calendly connections

• Monitor automations for errors and resolve issues quickly

• Document processes and maintain clear technical notes



Qualifications

• Proven experience launching or managing a self hosted N8N setup

• Experience working with VPS platforms such as DigitalOcean, Linode, Vultr, or similar

• Familiar with Docker or container based deployments

• Strong understanding of APIs, JSON, and webhook integrations

• Experience with Go High Level automation tools

• Familiar with Apollo, Instantly, and Calendly

• Reliable problem solving skills and attention to detail

• Clear written and spoken English

• Able to join occasional meetings with USA based tea
mbers



Preferred Skills



• Experience improving or rebuilding automation workflows

• Experience using Notion and ClickUp

• Familiarity with AI tools that support workflow creation



Compensation

Pay is negotiable based on experience.



Application Process

To apply for this role, candidates MUST complete all of the following steps:

 1. Submit a resume outlining your relevant experience.

 2. Provide links, screenshots, or examples of automation or self hosted work you have completed.

 3. Submit a newly recorded video stating the current date and explaining your experience with N8N and self hosted systems.

title: Data Extraction and Automation Specialist
description:
Company Overview



We are seeking a skilled Data Extraction and Automation Specialist who understands modern web scraping, lead data enrichment, automation workflows, and structured data management. Availability during U.S. Eastern hours is required.



Position Overview



We are hiring a Web Scraping and Lead Data Automation Specialist to support advanced list building, structured data extraction, and enrichment workflows. This role focuses on pulling targeted lead data at scale using Apify, Python, Clay, and APIs.



This is a hands on technical role for someone who understands scraping logic, selectors, pagination, anti-bot challenges, deduplication, and data normalization.



Key Responsibilities



• Build and maintain lead scraping workflows using Apify actors or Python

• Extract structured data from websites, directories, databases, and public sources

• Handle pagination, login flows, rate limits, and anti-scraping mechanisms

• Clean, dedupe, and normalize datasets

• Enrich scraped data using Clay

• Connect scraped and enriched data to CRM systems, Google Sheets, or CSV exports

• Build or integrate APIs for data transfer when needed

• Document scraping workflows and error handling processes

• Monitor automation health and troubleshoot broken workflows

• Deliver clean, structured lead lists ready for outbound campaigns



Qualifications



• Proven experience with web scraping using Apify or Python

• Strong understanding of HTML, CSS selectors, DOM structure

• Experience handling structured data formats such as JSON, CSV, and Excel

• Familiarity with REST APIs and authentication methods

• Experience using Clay for data enrichment

• Ability to troubleshoot scraping failures and adjust extraction logic

• Strong organizational skills and documentation habits

• Availability during U.S. Eastern hours



Preferred Skills



• Experience scraping education, healthcare, legal, or local business databases

• Familiarity with n8n, Zapier, or Make

• Experience integrating scraped data into Instantly, Apollo, Go High Level, or other CRMs

• Understanding of proxy management and anti-bot mitigation



Compensation



Pay is negotiable based on experience and technical depth.



Application Process



To apply for this position, candidates MUST complete all of the following steps:

 1. Submit a resume outlining web scraping and automation experience.

 3. Submit a newly recorded video introduction where you:

title: Assistant Controller
description:
**PLEASE CAREFULLY READ ALL THE DETAILS BEFORE APPLYING***



JOB TITLE: Assistant Controller

Work Type: Remote/WFH, Full-time

Rate: TBD

Duration: This is for a long-term hire (3–5+ years minimum) to ensure stability and avoid turnover.

Working Hours : Central Time

Start Date: Target start date is early MAY



NOTE:



--> This role will begin as an Assistant Controller, with the opportunity for promotion to Controller if everything goes well.

--> This is an assistant role, not the main Controller position. The focus is more on providing support rather than leading or owning the full Controller function.

--> Client Interview Stage:

           There will be a live Excel skills test.

           There will be a business overview ? candidate reiterates to confirm comprehension.



JOB OVERVIEW:



The Controller will manage all fund, corporate, and property-level accounting and reporting across the client's real estate investment platform. This role oversees cash management, capital activity, investor operations, financial reporting, audit/tax support, and coordination with fund administrators and property managers. The ideal candidate is organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable operating in a fast-paced, multi-entity private equity environment.



JOB ROLE & RESPONSIBILITIES:



Treasury & Cash Management



Maintain LOC, draw, and cash activity trackers; process transfers, wires, and invoice payments.

Complete bank reconciliations, classify cash activity, and monitor liquidity.

Manage distributions, NACHA uploads in KeyBank, and quarterly cash-flow analysis.



Fund & Investor Accounting



Maintain investor records in Juniper Square; process sub docs, capital calls, rebalancing, and distributions.

Enter capital, GAV/NAV, and asset data into Juniper Square; create new entities as needed.

Prepare capital call amounts, distribution analysis, and quarterly reporting support.



Financial Reporting



Review monthly property financials and capital activity.

Prepare HEP Manager and selected SPV financials; compare actuals to forecasts.

Support quarterly fund reporting, PCAP reviews, and coordination with fund administrators.



Audit & Tax Support



Provide PBCs, schedules, valuation support, and respond to auditor requests.

Assist with annual tax workpapers, K-1 review/distribution, 1099 processing, and municipal/state filings.



Entity Administration



Maintain annual state filings, insurance renewals, and corporate compliance.

Manage intercompany billing, legal invoice approvals, and post-closing S&U/proration tracking.



Systems & Process Management



Work extensively in Juniper Square, QuickBooks, KeyBank, and Yardi.

Implement best practices with fund admins and improve internal workflows.



JOB REQUIREMENTS:



Qualifications:



Bachelor’s in Accounting or Finance; CPA preferred.

Ideally with 5–10+ years in real estate private equity, fund accounting, or property accounting. (can consider 3–4 years of experience, as long as you have the right experience)

Strong Excel and systems skills.

Excellent communication, organization, and deadline management.

Must have Private Equity Real Estate (PERE) experience.

Familiarity with complex fund structures.

Capable of and willing to commit to a long-term engagement (minimum of 3–5+ years) to ensure stability and minimize turnover.



Why Work with Gabtech Global, LLC?



At Gabtech Global, we are committed to supporting our consultants and creating an environment where people can grow and succeed.



We uphold our core values:



EXTRA MILE: We do more than what’s expected of us.

RELIABLE: We do what we say we’ll do. No follow-ups are needed.

TEAM PLAYER: We collaborate with each other to achieve our goals.

GENUINE CARE: We do what we do because we want to, not because we have to.

HUNGRY TO LEARN: We strive to be better every day.

title: Escalation Lead
description:
**PLEASE CAREFULLY READ ALL THE DETAILS BEFORE APPLYING***



Job Title: Escalation Lead

Work Type: Remote/WFH Fulltime 

Working Hours: M-F (40-45 hours) , plus on-call weekends

Start Date: in 2 weeks



JOB OVERVIEW:



The client’s  Escalation Lead is responsible for owning policy, risk, and scope decisions during high-impact client’s escalations. This role ensures that identity, access, and security-related incidents are resolved without introducing unnecessary security exposure, by validating root cause, defining safe remediation boundaries, and approving (or rejecting) configuration changes during live incidents.



This role represents the decision authority that currently exists informally in client’s escalations.



JOB ROLE & RESPONSIBILITIES: 



1. Conditional Access & Identity Policy Authority

Serve as the escalation authority for:

Conditional Access (CA) failures

Token issuance errors

Cloud PC / Windows App access scope questions

Interpret Entra ID sign-in logs and CA outcomes to determine why access was blocked.

Approve or deny:

CA exclusions

Access scope changes

Authentication flow adjustments

Prevent “blind” policy changes by enforcing root-cause validation first.



2. Security Alert Legitimacy & Incident Context

Validate security alerts from Defender and Threat Locker to determine:

True security incidents

False positives

Alerts tied to known remediation actions (e.g., decryption activity)

Confirm whether escalation requires:

Security response

Documentation only

No action

Act as the final authority on whether an alert is safe to disregard.



3. Escalation Decision Governance

Act as the policy gatekeeper during active escalations:

“Is this the correct fix?”

“Does this widen access beyond intent?”

Ensure remediation steps are:

Scoped

Intentional

Reversible

Require confirmation that a change resolves the issue before approving additional modifications.



4. Cross-Functional Technical Direction

Provide technical direction to:

Identity engineers

Security engineers

Infrastructure teams

Service desk leads

Guide troubleshooting steps (e.g., reviewing sign-in logs, validating access targets).

Escalate to senior engineers only when justified by evidence.



5. Escalation Flow Control

Control the decision phase of client’s escalation flow: Intake ? Validation ? Approved Change ? Confirmation ? Closure

Ensure escalation threads do not stall or expand without justification.

Clearly signal when a remediation path is approved or blocked.



6. Other responsibilities

Based on alert activity and volume, other responsibilities will be assigned

Process design and documentation

Flexibility - a key to success for this role



JOB REQUIREMENTS:



Technical Expertise

Deep knowledge of:

Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD)

Conditional Access policies

MFA / SSPR authentication flows

Cloud PC and Windows App access behavior



Strong ability to interpret:

Sign-in logs

Token issuance failures

Security alert context

Operational Judgment

Experience acting as a technical authority during live incidents

Ability to make risk-balanced decisions under time pressure

Comfortable blocking changes that increase risk, even when resolution is urgent

Communication

Clear, decisive communication in escalation threads and verbal communication

Ability to explain why a change is or is not approved

Confident interacting with senior engineers and leadership during incidents

Success Criteria

The role is successful when:

Escalations resolve without over-permissive policy changes

Identity and access issues are fixed with confirmed cause

Security alerts are correctly classified

Repeat escalations decrease due to better guardrails and documentation

Role Boundaries

Does not solely own day-to-day execution of fixes (that remains shared with the team)

Does own:

Approval of changes



Risk acceptance

Escalation direction

May oversee other resources working similar shifts/hours, acting as a Team Lead

title: Sales Team Lead - Remote Tech Startup (Performance Bonuses + Growth Path)
description:
We run a high-growth online platform that converts web traffic into paying customers using a mix of live sales reps and AI-assisted workflows. We're doing six figures monthly and scaling fast. We need a Sales Operations Manager to own the entire live sales function - the team, the systems, the numbers. You'll report directly to the founder.



You'll manage a team of sales reps who handle live customer conversations. Your job is to make them better, make the operation bigger, and make the numbers go up. Specifically:

- Hire, train, schedule, and hold reps accountable

- Own the full conversation-to-conversion funnel - first message to paid customer

- Analyze conversation logs, build scripts and playbooks, and push conversion rates up week over week

- Scale the team as traffic grows without letting conversion quality drop

- Track and report key metrics: conversion rate, revenue per rep, response times, conversations handled

- Build SOPs and training materials so new hires ramp fast

- Coordinate with the ads team on traffic volume, audience quality, and timing



You:

- 2+ years managing a sales or customer-facing team (not just individual contributor experience)

- You think in conversion rates, not vibes - decisions backed by data

- Strong written English

- You build systems and enforce them

- Comfortable with remote async tools

- Available for set working hours - this is a real full-time role, not freelance



Big Plus

- Experience with AI-assisted sales workflows or hybrid human/AI operations

- Track record of measurably improving conversion rates

- Experience managing remote teams across time zones



Compensation

- 78,500PHP/mo starting base (~$1,300 USD), adjusted for experience

- Performance bonuses tied to conversion targets and revenue milestones

- Direct access to the founder - your input shapes company strategy

- Clear growth path - as the operation scales, so does your role and comp



To Apply

Send a message with: who you are, your relevant experience, the largest team you've managed, and your resume

title: Junior Tax Assistant (Entry Level)
description:
About The CPA Dude: 

The CPA Dude, a fast-growing tax firm serving high-net-worth individuals and businesses with complex tax profiles. In this role, you will be the backbone of our payroll operations, ensuring smooth client management, document handling, and supporting the full cycle payroll process. As a critical member of our team, you'll help deliver tax transformations with comprehensive care, embodying our mission to become the Nike of tax firms.



Role

A junior tax assistant is an entry level role targeted towards new graduates with a few years of professional experience interested in breaking into the U.S tax preparation industry. Our firm offers continuous career growth for promising juniors willing to get their foot wet. 



Responsibilities

- Assist with data entry on US tax returns

- Coordinate with senior tax associates on data entry projects

- Oversee and prepare list of open items on behalf of senior tax associates

- Perform basic financial reconciliation tasks

- Maintain professionalism communicating requests and updates within internal team



Results

- Maintain a high level of client and team responsiveness (same day or within 24 hours)

- Ensure high client satisfaction and retention through exceptional client service

- Maintain accurate and complete client files for efficient tax preparation

- Ensure timely filing of all client tax documents and extensions

- Contribute to the firm's growth through process improvement and efficiency



Requirements

- Bachelor's degree in business or accounting 

OR

- Bachelor's degree with 3 years of professional accounting, bookkeeping, tax, or PHP CPA firm experience. 



Location

- Remote position with dedicated and secure workspace required, free of distractions.



Benefits

1. 100% remote work environment with the infrastructure to work from anywhere in the world

2. No BS corporate culture - we're modern, laid back, and straight to the point

3. Professional development opportunities and continuous learning

4. Collaborative team culture with awesome co-workers

5. Opportunity to grow with a fast-expanding firm

6. Digital-first approach with cutting-edge tax technology

7. Work alongside tax professionals focused on innovative tax strategies

8. Entrepreneurial environment that rewards initiative and fresh ideas



Core Values

1. Communication: Honest, kind candor with prompt responses. We value over-communication—more context is always better.

2. Ownership: Taking full responsibility for work and relationships. Deadlines are non-negotiable, and quality work is expected.

3. Work Smarter, Not Harder: Leveraging better technology, refining processes, and bringing fresh, creative thinking.



Software You'll Use:

ProConnect (Intuit) – tax return and extension prep

TaxDome – CRM and secure client communication

QuickBooks Online – for coordinating with bookkeepers

Google Workspace – Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail (we don't use Microsoft Office)



Working Hours

Regular hours: 8 Hours with 6 hours overlap in US time

Weekend hours during tax season may be flexible.



Hiring Process

Apply and record a 
/Video introducing yourself and explaining why you are a good fit for this position.

 that and your resume to  : 



Prescreen interview (30 minutes)

Technical test (take-home)

Panel/culture interview (60 minutes)

title: Outbound Sales Account Manager - Construction Materials| Family Business 5 Years+
description:
Remote – Philippines | Full-Time | Long-Term

 $4.5-$8.5 /hour (based on experience) + Annual team bonuses TBD



About us



We are a fast-growing construction materials supplier working with builders, contractors, and developers nationwide.



We invest heavily in training, systems, and people - and we expect performance, loyalty and integrity in return.



We are a family-run business with a strong, loyal offshore team. You will be joining 6 experienced Filipino tea
mbers, many of whom have been with us for over 4 years.



The Role (What You’ll Actually Do) -  This is a sales-driven outbound account management role.  You will be speaking daily with existing customers (warm leads) who have already bought from us.



Your job is to:

- Rebuild EXISTING CUSTOMER relationships

- Generate repeat business from existing customers (HOT) - not cold leads

- Increase order value by being smart understanding requirments and upsell accordingly 

- Use the CRM and you productivity will be judged on output - 30-60 calls a day

- Build Quotes, get payments and load orders and monitor entire delivery workflow for your clients. 



Move customers up tiers (e.g. Silver ? Gold)

1. Outbound Sales & Account Management (Core Focus)

Call existing customers daily

Re-engage inactive buyers

Build relationships with UK builders and contractors

Ask structured questions about:

Current projects

What they are buying

Where they are currently purchasing

You are expected to sell, not just check in.

Log everything in the CRM and work the CRM to keep the sales flow



2. Sales Skills & Negotiation

Handle pricing conversations confidently

Position us against competitors (Jewson, Selco, B&Q, online suppliers)

Negotiate professionally to win business

Identify upsell and cross-sell opportunities

You must be comfortable:

Challenging customers

mbers for this role.

title: Sales Associate that close sales
description:
**TO APPLY YOU MUST CREATE A SHORT VIDEO INTRODUCING YOURSELF AND WHY YOU WILL BE THE PEFERCT CANIDADTE FOR THIS POSITION.



Sales Associate – Digital Product Training (75+ Calls Daily)



Position: Full-Time Sales Closer

Industry: Digital Products / Online Education

Location: Remote

Compensation: Base + Commission (High Earning Potential)



About Us



We are a fast-growing digital education company that helps entrepreneurs create and sell digital products. We host live trainings and sell an all-in-one Digital Products Creators Sales & Marketing System.



We are NOT looking for someone who “likes sales.”

We are looking for someone who lives and breathes closing.



Your Role: You will be responsible for calling warm leads daily from paid ads and a free training we conducted to:



* Sell tickets to our Digital Product Creators Mentorship Training

* Close sales for our Digital Product Creators Sales & Marketing System

* Follow up with prospects consistently

* Overcome objections confidently

* Hit daily call and revenue targets



You will be on the phone ALL DAY. This is a performance-driven role.



Daily Requirements



* Minimum 75-100 outbound calls per day

* Consistent follow-up via phone & SMS

* Daily reporting of:



Calls made

Conversations

Sales closed

Revenue generated

Comfortable handling objections and pushing for the close



Who We’re Looking For



You MUST have:



* Minimum **2+ years of phone sales experience**

* Strong closing skills

* Aggressive, confident, and results-driven personality

* Thick skin (you will hear “no” often)

* Ability to build urgency and create excitement

* High energy and professional tone on calls

* Reliable internet and quiet workspace



This is NOT for beginners.

This is for closers who want to win.



Compensation



* Competitive base pay

* Commission on every sale

* Performance bonuses for hitting targets

* High income potential for top performers



If you cannot handle rejection, high call volume, or aggressive targets — this role is not for you.



???? To Apply



Send:



1. A short video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself and why you will be the perfect canidate for this position

2. Your sales experience (include metrics if possible)

3. Your average daily call volume in past roles

4. Why you believe you are a closer and not just a salesperson



Only serious closers apply.

title: Facebook Ad Specialist - Home Renovation Services: Retainer + Large Performance Bonuses!
description:
HB Windows & Doors Inc. is a premium, family-run window and door installation company serving the Greater Toronto Area. We're hiring a
 Ads Specialist who can take ownership of our lead generation strategy with urgency and creativity.



We offer one of the most unique product bundles in the Canadian window industry — exclusive access to triple-pane + laminated glass. Your job will be to bring this offer to life, generate leads, and help us fill our calendar.



Compensation:

- Recommended Retainer: $300–$500 CAD/month (based on skills and results)

- Bonus Per Booked Appointment: $20–$60 CAD



*** THIS IS A PERFORMANCE-DRIVEN ROLE WITH SIGNIFICANT BONUS POTENTIAL BASED ON RESULTS ***



Responsibilities:

- Build, manage, and optimize
 ad campaigns for lead volume

- Test and refine messaging for our exclusive laminated + triple-pane offer

- Work with our Graphic Designer and VA to execute creatives and follow-ups

- Drive Cost Per Lead (CPL) down and maintain high close potential

- Report weekly on lead volume, CPL, CTR, and cost-per-booked-appointment



Requirements:

- Proven success running
 Ads for local or home services

- Experience with $1K–$3K ad budgets

- Strong copywriting and funnel building mindset

- Familiarity with lead form campaigns

- Ability to build and launch landing pages (design not required!)





How to Apply:

To be considered, follow these instructions carefully:



Use the subject line: HBWD - ROCKSTAR AD MANAGER



Answer the following questions:



1. What types of local service businesses have you run successful
 campaigns for?



2. How do you ensure lead quality while maximizing volume?



3. What’s your typical process in Month 1 of a new account?



4. What do you think is the biggest mistake home service companies make in
 Ads?



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Sales Assistant
description:
ScaleValley is an AI-powered SEO platform that grows organic traffic on autopilot. Customers connect their site, and we handle everything: keyword research, content, publishing, and backlinks. We're launching now and need someone to manage our sales outreach and close deals.



WHAT YOU'LL DO EVERY DAY:



Most outreach is automated — you push a few buttons and 200+
s go out. Your job is to manage what comes back: reply to interested leads, follow up with prospects, send LinkedIn DMs to creators and founders, and hop on Zoom demos when someone wants to see the product.



You'll work across three channels: agency partnerships (primary), newsletter placements, and creator/LinkedIn outreach. We give you the leads, the tools, the scripts, and the
 sequences. You bring the follow-through.



WE PROVIDE:

- 10,000+ agency leads

- 100+ newsletter contacts

- Outreach automation &
 sequences

- Demo scripts and objection handling docs

- Direct founder access for pricing questions



WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU:

- Strong written and spoken English (you'll write replies and run live calls)

- Experience in sales, lead gen, or outreach (B2B preferred)

- Comfortable on Zoom demos

- Organized, reliable follow-up without reminders

- Self-starter who doesn't need to be told what to do next



COMPENSATION:

- $1,500/mo base salary

- 8% of new monthly revenue from partners you close, paid for 3 months per deal

- Uncapped bonuses — strong performers hit $5,000–$6,000/mo total



HOW TO APPLY:



Send a cover letter answering BOTH of these questions (no answer = no review):



Start application with letter X



1. Tell us about a deal or sale you closed. What was it, how did you find the lead, and what happened when it stalled? 



2. You've sent 200 outreach
s over 5 days, got a 2% reply rate, zero demos booked. What do you do on Day 6?

Ensure product data is accurate, consistent, and structured

Build and manage SEO collections and category pages

Improve product compatibility information and reduce customer confusion

Organise product variants (sizes, finishes, filters)

Identify and fix gaps in product information

Work with support team to reduce repetitive customer enquiries



Requirements:



Experience with Shopify product management

Understanding of eCommerce SEO fundamentals

Strong attention to detail

Ability to structure and organise large product catalogues

Experience with bathroom/kitchen products is a bonus



KPIs:



Improvement in conversion rate

Reduction in product-related support tickets

Increase in organic traffic

Accuracy and consistency of product data



Important:

This role requires structured thinking and attention to detail. You must be able to work across large product ranges and maintain consistency.

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Automation & Conversion Specialist – Speed to Lead, Workflows, Onboarding
description:
We are not looking for someone to “build funnels.”



We are looking for someone who can take an existing GoHighLevel system, identify where leads are being lost, and improve it to increase bookings and conversion.



If your focus is only on setup, this role is not a fit.



We are hiring a GHL specialist to take ownership of our system.



The foundation is built. Your role is to refine, simplify, and optimise it for performance.



This role starts part-time and will move into full-time as lead flow increases.



What matters:

• Immediate speed to lead?• Clean, simple workflow logic?• Strong follow-up (WhatsApp,
, SMS)?• Pipelines aligned with real lead behaviour?• Fixing drop-offs and improving bookings?• Fast, smooth, scalable onboarding



You will:

• Audit the system from lead to booking?• Improve follow-up timing and logic?• Clean and simplify workflows?• Build and optimise our master snapshot?• Improve onboarding (fast, frictionless, scalable)?• Implement SMS into the follow-up system?• Ensure no leads are missed



Requirements:

• Strong GHL automation experience?• Understands logic, triggers, and conditions?• Focus on conversion, not just setup?• Can take ownership and work independently



To apply, answer:

1. How quickly should a lead be contacted after submitting a form?

2. What happens in the first 2 hours if they don’t respond?

3. What’s the most common mistake in GHL workflows?

4. How would you build a scalable onboarding system using a master snapshot?

Applications without answers will not be considered.

title: SUPERVISOR VIRTUAL ASSISTANT ROLE - Airbnb Short term rentals
description:
Overview: We’re hiring a proactive, detail-oriented Supervisor VA to manage day-to-day operations across a portfolio of short-term rentals. This role requires strong problem-solving, fast response times, and the ability to oversee cleaners, vendors, and guest experience end-to-end.



MUST HAVES (Please DO NOT apply if you don't have most of the must-haves below):

-We prioritize candidates who can demonstrate real problem-solving ability. We have a rigorous screening process before interview round so please kindly read this section thoroughly.

-AIRBNB STR Supervior experience for portfolio with 30-50 + units in the US with at least 2 years of experience being a supervisor

-Available in the PST hours range we posted below

-Airbnb Claims experience

-Articulate, lead well, and can communicate well/make several calls to vendors, cleaners, guests daily

-We're looking for Super Star A-PLAYER - a high-performing operator who is both a problem solver and a systems thinker. We will provide SOPs and structure, but you must be able to figure out the “how” — whether that’s resolving issues independently or building simple systems (people + process) to prevent them from happening again.

This role is best suited for someone who takes ownership, thinks critically, and improves operations—not just follows instructions. 

-Top performers in this role are compensated above market and given increasing ownership as we scale. 

-In your application, you must demonstrate how you're a system thinker. Please include a specific example of: 

-A specific operational problem you faced

-The exact steps or system you built to solve similar issues in the future

-The tangible outcome/ measurable result that then helps your team from the system or process you've built



Key Responsibilities:

Manage guest communication across Airbnb, VRBO, Booking, and direct bookings

Troubleshoot guest issues (WiFi, access, appliances, etc.) before escalating

Oversee reservations, calendar accuracy, and special requests

Coordinate cleaners (scheduling, confirmations, photo review, quality control)

Manage vendors & maintenance (calls, quotes, scheduling, follow-ups)

Track supplies, damages, and inventory across units

Handle escalations and support Ops Manager as needed

Maintain logs, SOPs, and daily admin tasks



Requirements:

Strong English (written + verbal)

Experience in short-term rental / hospitality / VA role

Excellent multitasking & problem-solving skills

Comfortable making calls to guests, cleaners, vendors

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

Familiar with Airbnb, PMS tools, and channel managers



Work Setup:

Remote, full-time, 2 days off a week

Must work during PST hours (it would be a 9 hrs shift within this window of 7AM-8PM PST. Specific shifts start and end time by day will be discussed based on team needs upon hiring.)

Weekend coverage required (especially Sun/Mon mornings)

mber.

title: GoHighLevel CRM Builder — Real Estate and Mortgage Advisor System
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

I am a real estate broker and mortgage advisor in Chicago. I need a skilled GoHighLevel (GHL) VA to build a complete CRM system from scratch. Everything is fully documented — you are building from written instructions, not creating strategy.



This is a project-based engagement estimated at 130–180 hours over 4 weeks. If the build is clean and you work well independently, there is ongoing maintenance work available after the project.



WHAT YOU WILL BUILD

— 18 sales pipelines with exact stage names (all documented)

— 60+ tag library entered exactly as specified

— 50+
 and SMS sequences (all copy written word for word — you enter it)

— Full workflow automation map — tags trigger sequences automatically

— ManyChat integration: 5 lead qualification flows with complete scripts

— GHL AI bot: 3 workflows (after-hours, missed call, 45-minute gap)

— BombBomb video tool connected to GHL

— All action-based automation rules (reply, book, close, bounce, DNC)



EVERYTHING IS PROVIDED

You will receive complete PDF documentation for every component of this system. Every
 is written. Every sequence is mapped. Every tag is named. Your job is accurate entry and configuration — not creative work.



HOW THE BUILD WORKS

Phase 1 (Days 1–5): Foundation — pipelines, tags, calendar, phone, signature

Phase 2 (Days 6–18): All sequences and automation triggers

Phase 3 (Days 19–26): ManyChat, GHL bot, BombBomb, integrations



I verify the work at the end of each phase before you proceed. Nothing moves forward until the current phase is confirmed correct.



REQUIREMENTS

— Proven GoHighLevel experience — you must be able to show me a GHL sub-account you have built

— Ability to follow written documentation exactly without improvising

— Strong attention to detail — one wrong tag name breaks an automation

— Available for a daily 10-minute check-in during the build (US Central Time morning preferred)

— Fluent written English for communication



NICE TO HAVE

— ManyChat experience

— Real estate or mortgage VA background



RATE

$8–$15/hour depending on experience. Estimated 130–180 hours total.



TO APPLY

Please send: (1) A screenshot or short video of a GHL sub-account you have built, (2) Your answer to this question: What is the difference between a GHL workflow trigger and a pipeline stage action? Applications without both will not be reviewed.

title: SEO Content Specialist (Blog Writer & On-Page SEO Manager)
description:
Role Overview



We’re looking for a detail-oriented SEO Content Specialist to support our growing client portfolio at Warren Digital. This role focuses on publishing and optimising blog content for SEO — not creating strategy.



You’ll be responsible for executing clearly defined SEO tasks to improve rankings, internal linking, and overall on-page performance across client sites.



Note: This is an execution-focused role. No strategy creation is required.



Key Responsibilities

Content Publishing & Optimisation

Upload and publish blog content across client websites (primarily WordPress or similar CMS)

Format content for readability (headings, spacing, lists, etc.)

Add and optimise images (including generating AI images when required)

Ensure all blogs meet SEO best practices before publishing

On-Page SEO Execution

Write and optimise:

Meta titles & descriptions

H1–H3 structure

Image alt text

URL slugs

Implement schema markup (Article, FAQ, etc.)

Apply E-E-A-T principles (Experience, Expertise, Authority, Trust)

Ensure proper keyword placement and density

Internal Linking

Add relevant internal links across blogs and service pages

Identify linking opportunities to improve site structure and SEO authority

Content Enhancement

Improve existing blog posts with:

Updated formatting

Better keyword targeting

Additional internal links

Image enhancements

EEAT improvements (author signals, credibility, trust elements)

Requirements

Proven experience in SEO content publishing

Strong understanding of:

On-page SEO

Meta tags & schema markup

Internal linking strategies

E-E-A-T principles

Experience with CMS platforms (WordPress preferred)

Ability to generate or source relevant images (AI tools like Midjourney, DALL·E, etc. are a plus)

High attention to detail and consistency

Nice to Have

Experience with SurferSEO, Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar tools

Basic understanding of technical SEO

Copywriting skills for conversion-focused content

Experience developing AI prompts for content and meta tag generation

Compensation

$5 USD per hour

Ongoing work for the right candidate

Application Requirements



To be considered, please submit:



1. 3-Minute Loom Video



Explain:



Your experience with SEO content publishing

Your process for optimising a blog post

Tools you use

2. Practical Test Task



Visit: 



Provide a short audit outlining:



5 specific things you would do to improve the site’s SEO, for example:



Content improvements

Internal linking opportunities

On-page SEO fixes

Technical or UX suggestions

Blog/content strategy ideas



(Be specific — we’re looking for actionable insights, not generic advice.)

title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description:
We are hiring a senior frontend engineer to build and own high-quality product experiences across our

web application. This role is for someone who is strong in React and TypeScript, partners closely with

UX and product, turns Figma designs into polished production UI, and uses AI tools pragmatically to

move faster on styling, testing, automation, and frontend functionality.



What You Will Do

? Build and maintain complex frontend product flows in React and TypeScript.

? Partner closely with UX and design to translate Figma into clean, responsive, production-ready

interfaces.

? Improve product quality through better component architecture, frontend testing, and UI

consistency.

? Use AI-assisted tools to accelerate implementation, styling iteration, test generation, QA workflows,

and repetitive frontend tasks without lowering engineering standards.

? Own frontend functionality end to end, including state management, async data flows, error

handling, edge cases, and performance.

? Build and maintain reusable UI patterns, components, and design system conventions.

? Write and maintain automated tests for critical user flows, visual regressions, and frontend behavior.

? Collaborate with product, backend, and design to ship quickly and make sound technical tradeoffs.

? Debug production issues efficiently and improve reliability across core user journeys.



What We Are Looking For

? 5+ years building modern web applications in React and TypeScript.

? Strong experience working directly with UX and design teams and implementing from Figma with

high visual fidelity.

? Strong frontend product judgment, not just component-level coding.

? Experience building complex app flows with forms, async states, integrations, auth, and real-world

edge cases.

? Experience with frontend testing and automation using tools like Playwright, Vitest, Cypress, or

similar.

? Comfort using AI tools to speed up UI development, styling exploration, test creation, and workflow

automation.

? Strong CSS and frontend systems skills, including responsive design, accessibility, and

maintainable component styling.

? Able to move quickly, make reasonable decisions independently, and keep code quality high.

? Strong communicator who can work cross-functionally with design, product, and engineering.



Nice to Have

? Experience with Tailwind, design systems, and component libraries.

? Experience with real-time apps, collaborative UI, or data-heavy product interfaces.

? Experience with Supabase, Shopify integrations, or SaaS workflow products.

? Experience using AI-assisted developer workflows in a disciplined, production-oriented way.



How We Describe the Ideal Candidate

? You are not just a frontend developer who waits for perfect specs. You can work from product goals,

collaborate tightly with UX, use Figma well, ship polished interfaces fast, and use AI as a force

multiplier for execution.

? You care about speed, but you also care about correctness, maintainability, and user experience.



If you are interested, please include your LinkedIn name in your message. (not link)

title: Audit - SEO, Google Ads and website setup
description:
We are a natural skincare company. Our products are award-winning and trusted by thousands of families. Recently, we’ve experienced a drop in organic performance and ROI on google ads — and we’re looking for an experienced SEO consultant to audit our website, identify the causes, and create a clear recovery plan.

Role Overview

You’ll lead a full SEO and search audit to help us understand why organic revenue has declined and how to rebuild sustainable performance. Focus areas include technical SEO, domain consolidation, paid search cannibalization, and improving our visibility in both Google and emerging AI-driven search results.

Key Responsibilities

• Perform a comprehensive SEO audit (technical, content, and on-page).

• Identify domain conflicts and duplicate indexing between 
, .com, and Shopify URLs.

• Check for hreflang configuration issues and recommend fixes.

• Analyse Google Ads overlap and develop strategies to reduce organic cannibalization.

• Audit meta titles and descriptions for CTR improvement opportunities.

• Review data in GA4 and Google Search Console for accuracy and insights.

• Suggest practical, high-impact changes to restore organic rankings and traffic.

• Provide clear documentation and communicate findings via report or video walkthrough.

Qualifications

• 4+ years of strong SEO experience, particularly in eCommerce or Shopify.

• Proven success recovering or improving organic traffic for online stores.

• Expertise with Google Search Console, GA4, Ahrefs or SEMrush, and technical SEO tools.

• Understanding of cannibalisation, hreflang, and structured data best practices.

• Excellent communication and analytical reporting skills.

• Experience optimizing for user engagement and conversion, not just rankings.

Deliverables

• Full SEO Audit Report with findings and actionable recommendations.

• List of priority technical fixes.

• Updated meta title and meta description suggestions for key pages.

• Documentation or SOPs for maintaining healthy search performance long-term.

title: AI Engineer
description:
About the Role



We are looking for an AI Engineer to join a small, fast-moving team building an AI-powered SaaS platform from the ground up. You will own the intelligence layer of the platform - the components responsible for language understanding, semantic search, embedding pipelines, and speech-to-text processing.



This is a full-time position.



What You Will Be Doing



- Building and maintaining a provider-agnostic AI abstraction layer supporting multiple LLM providers

- Designing and managing embedding generation pipelines with structured metadata filtering

- Integrating and maintaining a vector database for semantic search at scale

- Building and maintaining a speech-to-text transcription pipeline with quality validation and fallback handling

- Implementing semantic analysis logic to extract structured insights from conversational text

- Working from detailed written specifications provided by the product owner

- Submitting daily written progress updates





Must-Have Skills



- Python - 3+ years in production AI or ML systems

- OpenAI API - embeddings and chat completions in production (not just tutorials)

- Vector database experience - Weaviate, Qdrant, Pinecone, or equivalent in a production environment

- Embedding pipeline design - you understand embedding drift, dimensionality, and metadata filtering

- Speech-to-text integration - Whisper or equivalent in a production pipeline

- NLP or text analysis in deployed, production systems

- Building AI abstraction layers that are not hard-coded to a single provider





Nice to Have



- Experience with behavior or intent detection from conversational text

- Familiarity with LangChain, LlamaIndex, or similar orchestration frameworks

- Background in conversation intelligence, speech analytics, or call center technology

- Experience with Weaviate specifically including hybrid search

- Understanding of RAG (retrieval-augmented generation) architectures in production





Non-Negotiables



- Production systems only. Tutorial projects and demos do not qualify.

- You must design systems that can swap AI providers without rewriting core application logic. Hard-coding a single provider is a disqualifier.

- You must understand that embedding generation and vector storage are separate responsibilities.

- You must think about fallback handling, rate limits, and model output validation - not just the happy path.

- IP assignment agreement and NDA must be signed before engagement begins.

- You will not communicate directly with other developers. All coordination goes through the product owner.





Engagement Terms



- Competitive rate based on market levels for your region

- Contract with IP assignment and NDA





How to Apply



Send the following:



1. A description of a production AI system you built - what it did, what the hard parts were, and what you would do differently today

2. Your GitHub profile or a code sample showing Python AI integration work

3. Your expected monthly rate and availability



Shortlisted candidates will be required to take a technical skills knowledge test.

title: Surplus Funds Lead Generation & Skip Tracing Specialist Job Summary
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a detail-oriented and resourceful individual to identify potential surplus fund opportunities and locate property owners or heirs through skip tracing. This role is critical in connecting individuals with unclaimed or surplus funds resulting from foreclosures, tax sales, or other asset recoveries.



Key Responsibilities

1.Research and identify surplus fund opportunities from public records (e.g., foreclosure auctions, tax & mortage overages, court filings)

2. Generate and qualify leads for potential claims

3. Conduct skip tracing to locate property owners, heirs, or rightful claimants

3. Use databases, online tools, and public records to gather accurate contact information

4. Maintain and update lead tracking systems (CRM or spreadsheets)

5. Verify ownership details and ensure accuracy of collected data

6. Collaborate with internal team members to move leads through the claims process

7. Ensure compliance with all applicable laws, regulations, and ethical standards

Meet daily/weekly lead generation and contact targets



Qualifications

1.High school diploma or equivalent (college preferred)

2.Experience in lead generation, data research, collections, real estate, or skip tracing preferred

3.Strong internet research and investigative skills

4.Familiarity with public records and databases

5.Proficiency with computers, spreadsheets, and CRM tools

6.Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

7.Strong communication and organizational skills



Preferred Skills

1.Experience with skip tracing tools (e.g., LexisNexis, TLOxp, BeenVerified, or similar platforms)

2.Knowledge of foreclosure processes, tax liens, or surplus funds recovery

3.Sales or cold outreach experience (phone,
, or text) must check DNC list before calling

4.Ability to work independently and meet performance goals



Work Environment

1.Remote or office-based depending on company setup

2.Flexible hours may be available

3.Fast-paced, results-driven environment



Important Note



This role requires handling sensitive personal data. Candidates must demonstrate integrity, professionalism, and adherence to privacy laws and ethical standards.

title: Client Acquisition Specialist
description:
About LexNavi

LexNavi Agency is a Legal Process Outsourcing (LPO) company providing back-office estate planning paralegal drafting support to U.S. law firms. We deliver execution-ready trust packages on a monthly retainer so attorneys can focus on client relationships and revenue — not document production.

We are building for long-term, process-driven growth. This role is the first dedicated sales hire at LexNavi, and the person who fills it will help shape how the agency acquires and retains clients.







The Role

The Client Acquisition Specialist is responsible for filling and moving the pipeline: generating qualified leads, booking discovery calls, running the sales process with the CEO, and closing new retainer clients.

This is not a volume-spam role. Our target market is U.S. estate planning law firms in California, Florida, New York, and Massachusetts. The outreach is specific, the messaging is precise, and the goal is earning long-term client relationships — not one-time transactions.

In addition to pipeline activity, you will help build the sales infrastructure: CRM setup, outreach SOPs, proposal templates, and a repeatable process the agency can scale.



Core Responsibilities

Generate qualified leads from U.S. estate planning law firms via LinkedIn, cold
, referrals, and other outreach channels

Build and maintain a structured lead list targeting PST and EST time zones (CA, FL, NY, MA)

Execute outreach campaigns that follow LexNavi voice standards — specific, process-oriented, no pressure

Qualify prospects against LexNavi's Ideal Client Profile (established EP workflow, WealthCounsel or comparable platform, desire for long-term drafting support)

Book and facilitate discovery calls with CEO; support the proposal and closing process

Manage the CRM — accurate pipeline data, follow-up tracking, deal stage documentation

Create SOPs with the CEO covering: Lead Qualification, Discovery Call Script, Lead Gen & Outreach, CRM Management, Proposal & Contract Drafting, and Client Acquisition Playbook

Report on weekly KPIs: outreach volume, response rates, calls booked, calls completed, proposals sent, clients signed

Gather and report market intelligence: client objections, competitor positioning, new service opportunities

Coordinate with COO for smooth client handoff after signing

Participate in weekly 1-on-1 with CEO for pipeline review and strategy



Qualifications

Required

Demonstrated experience in B2B sales, outreach, or business development — remote setting strongly preferred

Strong written English — outreach and proposal copy must be precise, specific, and professional

Comfortable working asynchronously with a small, remote team

Process-oriented: you build systems, not just activity

Accountable to KPIs — you track what you do and report it honestly



Preferred

Prior experience selling to law firms, legal services, or professional services B2B clients

Familiarity with estate planning, legal drafting, or LPO services

CRM experience (any platform — we will configure during onboarding)

LinkedIn Sales Navigator experience

Experience writing cold outreach that converts at above-average rates



Disqualifiers

Relies on volume-spray tactics over targeted, specific outreach

Cannot or will not follow documented communication standards

Uncomfortable with a transparent, KPI-tracked performance environment

title: VIDEO EDITOR FOR MARKETING AGENCY (Short-Form Ads | Ongoing Work)
description:
We're a US-based video marketing agency producing cinematic short-form video ads for our clients.

We're busy, which means steady, ongoing work for the right person.



This starts as a part-time, per-video arrangement. If you're good and reliable, this grows.

---



WHAT YOU'LL BE EDITING



Short-form vertical video ads (1-2 minutes), typically built around a script OR unscripted testimonials with b-roll and stock footage layered in. Clean, cinematic, and premium-looking content.



This is important:  What we're NOT looking for is an editor who relies on flashy transitions, flying text, and motion effects to carry a video. If your best work is built around those things, we're probably not the right fit. If your best work is built around making footage feel intentional and polished - we want to hear from you. What we care about is the fundamentals: pacing decisions, choosing the best takes, b-roll selection, color correction, and clean storytelling.



---



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



We can teach technical skills. What's harder to find - and what we care about most - is two things:



1. Attention to detail and ability to learn from feedback. Before you send any edit, you've already watched it three times and caught every issue yourself. We understand mistakes happen, but we should never have to tell you something twice.



2. A good eye. Specifically when it comes to stock footage and b-roll. You know the difference between a clip that feels natural and cinematic versus one that looks awkward or like generic stock footage. 



---



PAY



We start at $75 USD per video. But here's what we've found: editors who deliver clean, revision-light work that we can approve quickly become invaluable - and we pay them accordingly. If you're the kind of editor who takes pride in getting it right before it ever lands in our inbox, there's real room to grow here financially.



REQUIREMENTS



— Adobe Premiere Pro 2025 / 2026 (required)

— The ability to edit at least 3-5 videos per week

— Fluent English, written and spoken

— Experience editing short-form testimonial videos, cinematic interview-style content, and lifestyle b-roll

— A computer capable of storing and handling 4K footage and graphics smoothly

— Strong communication and responsiveness - if we send a message, we expect a reply the same day

— Open-minded and willing to learn new systems and workflows



---



HOW TO APPLY



Do not just send your resume. We receive a lot of applications and we read every one - but here's how to make sure yours gets noticed:



Answer this question in your application: What is your go-to coffee order?



If you don't answer it, we won't move forward. It's a small thing, but it tells us you read carefully and follow instructions - which matters a lot in this role.



Also include:

- A short note about yourself and your editing experience

- Your portfolio

- 2–3 samples of your BEST work



Shortlisted applicants will be asked to complete a short skills test before any paid work begins. It won't take long, but it's how we make sure we're a good fit for each other.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Adobe Premiere Pro Video Editor
description:
To apply, you must use at least 5 Apply Points (or more if you’re a strong fit). Applications using fewer than 5 points will be ignored

         

Paid weekly or Bi-weekly with the expectation of accomplishing the week’s total workload/quota



Starting at 8 hours per day. 3.5 days per week.



I am creating a small content creation team of 2 video editors/social media managers/virtual assistants. 



1 person will be hired first & the second will be hired 1-2 months later after best practices are established. Eventually, the team can work together d
 their own scheduling for each week.



I have 2 content based brands which need a lot of video editing & short form clipping for marketing.



Brand #1: 
/livejn 

- the current kind of content on that page isn’t a good representation of what you will be asked to edit, but that’s the brand you will be editing for.

- you will be asked to cut daily 3hour-7hour livestreams into short 10-20minute vlogs. These vlog edits will be fairly simple. Only including 
nts featuring high intensity action, emotion, connection or discussion. 

- from these “highlights”, you will be asked to create engaging clips of each 
nt and post these clips on across all social media platforms

- there is also a miscellaneous quota for posting other kinds of related content to foster the most engagement. example: trial reels of previous popular content



Brand #2: 
 

- I am a head coach of this dating company teaching men social & seduction skills.

- I will be recording my coaching sessions to be similarly cut into engaging shortform captions.

- I will also shoot shortform & longform lesson based videos which will need to be cut, edited & posted onto all social media platforms



Primary Skill Required: Vlog-style video editing & high volume posting across all social media platforms (up to 50+ posts per day)

- editing & project sharing on adobe premiere pro. (I can pay for your monthly subscription)

- the most important skill is understanding emotionally impactful & engaging content. I will have 10 years of experience as a content producer. If I can create edits better than what the candidates can produce, they will be released or not considered for employment.



Secondary Skill: Miscellaneous work as a social media manager/virtual assistant to help with each brand’s needs as they arise.



This is what the hiring process will look like:

1. I will review applications. 

2. I will select desired candidates and send them an example vlog of what I’m seeking to create.

3. Selected candidates then should edit an example vlog from a new 3hour-7hour livestream. As well as three 8 second to 30 second shortform trailer edits; ideally deeply moving/engaging. An example will be provided. (You will be paid $20 for this trial)

4. From the work reviewed, I will select whomever seems like the best fit and work is scheduled to begin by April 15th.



Candidate must:

- be fluent in English

- provide examples of their body of  work related to what this job requires 



Please briefly  in your application tell me: 

- whether the $5/hour offered rate is low, normal or high for what you are seeking. 

- what your main passion/hobby in life is

- where do you see yourself professionally in 5 years



If/as the content monetizes well, hourly rates can raise to double or triple over time. 



Warning: My content, topics & sense of humor can often be often extremely crude, offensive & politically incorrect. Whoever applies must be able to either understand or enjoy those instances.

title: Digital Marketing & E-commerce Assistant at True Gear
description:
At True Gear, we’re a small but dedicated team based in Australia, and we're on a mission to provide top-notch portable power solutions and adventure equipment for people who love caravanning. We’re looking for a new tea
mber who is ready to jump in and help us grow. Could it be you?



About the Team:



Our team is currently made up of two awesome people: myself, the business owner, and one full-time tea
mber based in the Philippines. We work closely together, with lots of collaboration, and I’m involved in the day-to-day operations. Now, we're looking to bring someone else on board to help us expand our marketing efforts and take True Gear to the next level.



The Role:



This position is all about analysing and improving our marketing, learning on the job, and helping to drive growth through key platforms. The role will start with a paid trial period of about a month, during which we’ll get to know each other and see if we’re a good fit. If things go well, the role will evolve into a more structured position that fits your schedule.



You’ll be working across six key platforms (from most to least important):



Google Ads

Shopify

Google Sheets

Klaviyo 
 Marketing)

Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

Canva





While the role has a clear structure, we’re a small team, so you'll need to be adaptable and ready to take on new tasks and challenges that come up (you'll never be left alone if you're unsure so don't stress).



What You’ll Be Doing:



Google Ads: You'll start by analyzing product profitability and desirability using templates we provide, and then manage our Google Ads campaigns. This includes keyword research and using a three-tier Google Ads shopping approach.



Meta Ads & Klaviyo: Once you’re comfortable with Google Ads, you’ll take on responsibilities with Meta Ads 
 & Instagram) and help set up
 flows in Klaviyo.



Collaboration: You'll be working closely with the team, providing updates and collaborating on strategies to drive sales and awareness for True Gear. Your contributions will have a direct impact on our growth.



What We Need from You:



Google Ads Experience: We’re looking for someone who is comfortable with Google Ads, especially keyword targeting and managing shopping campaigns. Familiarity with the three-tier shopping strategy is a big plus.



Shopify Experience: While not essential, experience with Shopify will make your life a lot easier. If you're new to it, no worries -we’ll help you get up to speed.



Meta Ads, Klaviyo, Canva: If you have experience with these tools, awesome! If not, don’t worry. We’ll provide training to help you learn.



Flexible and Self-Motivated: As part of a small team, it’s important that you can take ownership of your work.



Communication Skills: Since we’re a remote team with flexible working hours, good communication is key. We need someone who is proactive about updating the team, asking questions when needed, and keeping everyone in the loop.



What We Offer:



A Friendly, Supportive Environment: We’re a tight-knit team where your contribution will truly make a difference. You won’t just be a cog in the machine - you can really move the needle.



Flexibility: After the trial period, we’re happy to accommodate a schedule that works for you. We can discuss full-time hours and can make it work as long as commitments are met and communication stays clear.



Training and Growth: We’ll support your learning and development, especially with platforms like Meta Ads, Klaviyo, and Canva. This is a role that will allow you to expand your marketing skills while helping us grow the business.



Work-Life Balance: We understand the importance of balancing work with your personal life, and we offer flexibility to make that happen.



Expectations:



We value commitment, responsibility, and open communication. During the trial period, we’ll be assessing how well you follow through on tasks and communicate when challenges arise. If you’re someone who thrives in a small, fast-paced environment and can take ownership of your work, we think you’ll love it here.



Application Process:



Application Deadline: April 17th, 5pm AEST

How to Apply: If this role sounds like a good fit, we’d love to hear from you. Click the application link below to submit your application.



Application link:

What This Role Is

You are not a task-doer. You are the second person in the company.



You bring marketing skills (influencer outreach, lead generation, social media). You also handle operations and administration so I can focus on product and partnerships.



You will help me figure out what to do, not just do what I say.



What You'll Do

Marketing (you lead this)

Influencer outreach – find, contact, track trucker influencers

Lead generation – recruit beta testers from
, Reddit, forums

Social media management – schedule posts, engage, help grow audience

Make recommendations – what's working, what's not, what we should try



Operations & Administration (you handle this)

Manage my calendar and

Track tasks in ClickUp

Maintain CRM (HubSpot)

Document processes as we build them



Strategy (we do this together)

Weekly planning – what are our priorities?

Problem-solving – how do we get more users?

Feedback – tell me when I'm wrong or missing something



Who You Are

You have experience with influencer marketing, lead generation, or social media management (2+ years or proven results)

You are organized – you use tools like CRMs and project management software without being taught

You are proactive – you see what needs to be done and do it

You want to grow with a company, not collect a paycheck

You are comfortable with ambiguity – startups change daily

You speak and write English naturally (not stiff/corporate)



What You Get

Direct access to the founder – no layers

Real ownership – your ideas will become reality

Growth path – VA ? Marketing Lead ? Chief of Staff (based on company growth)

Equity discussion at 6 months for strong performers

A chance to build something from the ground up



Hiring Process

Apply – Send the items below

Screening – 3 questions via chat

Video/phone call – 20 minutes

Paid trial ($10-$15 for 2–3 hours of real work)

Offer



To Apply

Subject line: RIG53 #2 – [Your Name]

Send:

A short cover letter explaining:

What marketing work you've done (influencer, lead gen, social)

What tools you use (CRM, project management, scheduling)

Why you want to be someone's second-in-command at a startup

One example of a marketing result you drove (numbers if possible)

One question about Rig53 or the founder

title: Business Development Representative (SDR) - Remote Job
description:

• Schedule introductory meetings between Account Executives and prospective clients.

• Assist in marketing efforts including online campaigns, direct mail, and more.

What It Takes:

Experience & Results

• Proven track record of meeting and exceeding measurable sales goals in a highly automated, metrics-driven environment.

Tech-Savviness

• Familiarity with technology trends in at least one of the following areas: Colocation, Corporate IT, Public Cloud, CDN, or Cybersecurity.

Customer Understanding

Creativity & Confidence

• You think outside the box, challenge assumptions, and bring fresh ideas.

Communication

Tech Curiosity

• Ability to understand and communicate advanced technologies with enthusiasm.

Agility

• Thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic team environment.

Ownership

• Self-motivated and results-oriented with a "get-it-done" mindset.

Multitasking

Tools Experience (a plus)

Team Spirit

• A true team player who enjoys collaborating and contributing to group success.

Entrepreneurial Mindset

• Think like a business owner. Take initiative and work independently to reach aggressive goals.

Ethics & Integrity

• High moral standards and a strong sense of professionalism.

Personality

• Friendly, fun, and easy to work with!

Languages

• Fluent in English. Proficiency in Russian, German, or Spanish is a plus. Additional languages are an advantage.

The Ideal Candidate

• Intelligent, self-driven, and quick to learn. Able to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-changing environment. Strong presentation and communication skills.

Why Join Us?

At ITDW Group, you'll be immersed in cutting-edge technologies across data centers, cloud computing, cybersecurity, and performance optimization.

You'll collaborate with a wide range of businesses—from rising startups to established enterprises.

We value independent thinkers, entrepreneurial spirit, and team players. In return, we offer competitive compensation and growth opportunities in a supportive and dynamic environment.

________________________________________

Why ITDW GROUP?

Join a fast-growing company working with leading startups and enterprises worldwide. Flexible, remote-friendly culture, competitive compensation, and career growth opportunities.

title: Video Editor – Full-Time
description:
We're looking for a skilled and reliable video editor to join our team full-time. You'll be responsible for editing both short-form and long-form video content across multiple platforms. This role requires someone who can work fast, meet tight deadlines, and consistently deliver polished, publish-ready content.

Responsibilities



Edit short-form content (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) and long-form content (YouTube videos, webinars, tutorials)

Incorporate AI-generated animations and visual effects into both short-form and long-form videos

Ensure all content is edited, finalized, and posted within required turnaround times

Maintain consistent branding, pacing, and quality across all deliverables

Communicate proactively on project status, especially when working against tight deadlines

Stay current with trending editing styles, transitions, and AI animation tools



Requirements



Proven experience editing both short-form and long-form video content

Hands-on experience with AI animation tools and the ability to integrate AI-generated visuals seamlessly into video projects

Proficiency in professional editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut Pro, or similar)

Strong attention to detail and ability to self-review work before submission

Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and hit deadlines consistently

Reliable internet connection and availability for full-time hours



Compensation & Details



$3–$8 per hour depending on experience and skill level

Full-time position

Weekly payouts via Wise

Remote / work from anywhere



To Apply

Send your portfolio or reel showcasing both short-form and long-form edits, along with any examples of AI animation work you've done. Include your availability and expected hourly rate within the listed range.

title: Video Editor - Social Media
description:
Video Editor (Remote)

USA based eyewear brand | Part-Time ? Full-Time with Strong Performance 



Location: Remote 

Hours: 20 hours/week to start ? Full-time (40 hrs/week) after ~2 months

Compensation: Based on experience + performance bonuses



About The Brand:

We are a sophisticated eyewear brand designing small-batch, handmade sunglasses for smaller face shapes, an overlooked niche in the industry. Each piece is crafted in Italy and released in limited quantities. 

We are building a brand rooted in storytelling, craftsmanship, and high taste. We are looking for a video editor to help us improve quality, output, and consistency of social media content. 



The Role

This is a video editing role with a strong emphasis on storytelling, craftsmanship, brand building, elevated taste, consistency, and founder-led content. 

You will be responsible for turning raw footage into high-performing, visually cohesive content across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube. You will work 1:1 with the founder in 2-3 weekly meetings to discuss social media strategy and goals for the week. 



Key Responsibilities

Content Editing (Primary Focus)

- Edit short-form content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Turn raw footage into engaging, high-retention videos 

- Create multiple variations of select videos for A/B testing and trial reels

- Incorporate B-roll, overlays, captions, and sound design



Visual Identity & Consistency

- Apply Memorí’s approved visual elements (fonts, colors, style)

- Maintain consistency across all content without handholding

- Help develop a signature editing style and recurring content series



Carousels & Static Content

- Create carousel posts that are visually cohesive and on-brand

- Ensure consistency in layout, typography, and storytelling

-Create thumbnails for short form video content that is on-brand yet easy to read



Founder-Led Content

- Edit and shape founder-led content into clear, engaging narratives

- Highlight personality, humor, and storytelling to build trust with our audience



Collaboration & Workflow

- Work from organized Google Drive folders of approved content

- Independently select and combine elements into strong final outputs

- Participate in 2x weekly strategy and feedback calls



Performance & Reporting

- Contribute to weekly discussions on what is working vs. not

- Be open to feedback and iteration



What We’re Looking For:

Must-Haves

- Strong portfolio of short-form video content

- High taste level and strong visual instincts

- Ability to maintain consistency across content

- Strong understanding of pacing, hooks, and storytelling

- Ability to execute without constant direction



High Taste Level (Non-Negotiable)

You must understand what feels premium, elevated, and aligned with a contemporary brand.



Compensation Structure

Phase 1: Trial (First ~2 Months)

- Base pay only, hourly rate

- Opportunity to transition to full-time



Phase 2: Full-Time

-Weekly base salary + performance bonuses

- Bonuses based on top 3 performing posts each month

- Evaluated on:

  - Saves and shares, watch time, engagement quality 

*Engagement must come from authentic audience behavior. Any indication of artificial engagement (bots, pods, etc.) will be disqualified from bonuses and may lead to termination. 



How to Apply

**IF YOU DO NOT FOLLOW THE STEPS BELOW, YOU WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS JOB**

1. Complete this survey: (copy/paste this link into your browser) 
 

^note this survey will ask you to attach your resume/CV, Provide a link to your portfolio, and upload a 30 second - 2 minute video introducing yourself. 



2. After the above is reviewed, selected candidates will then be asked to complete a PAID test project



Final Note:

We are looking for someone who cares deeply about quality, consistency, and building a strong visual identity over time. With great work, there is a lot of opportunity to grow and have high earning potential within our company.

title: Hiring a Video Editor for Online Ads (E-commerce)
description:
