title: AI Engineer
description:
About Cynergists: We provide advanced AI Agents designed to empower businesses to automate workflows, maximize productivity, and unlock limitless growth. We don't just fill seats; we deploy operations. Cynergists is moving beyond traditional staffing to define the future of intelligent automation. 

The Role: We are looking for a hungry, tech-curious individual to join our team. You do not need years of tech sales experience to apply. If you are coachable and ready to learn, our proprietary AI Sales Trainer will get you up to speed quickly.

Your primary goal is simple: Talk to business owners, identify their operational "bottlenecks," and match them with the perfect AI Agent from our catalog. If we don't have an agent ready, you will help scope a Custom AI Build to solve their unique problem.

Key Responsibilities:

Diagnostic Selling: Engage with leads to understand their current workflows and pain points. You aren’t just selling; you are diagnosing inefficiencies.

The "Matchmaker" Process:

Assess the client’s needs.

Direct them to the specific AI Agent on our website that solves that problem.

If a pre-made Agent doesn't exist, coordinate with our tech team to propose a Custom AI Agent Build.

Rapid Skill Development: Work daily with Briggs, our AI Sales Trainer, to refine your pitch, learn objection handling, and master the art of AI consulting.

Pipeline Management: Utilize Go High Level (GHL) to track leads, schedule follow-ups, and manage your deals from initial conversation to close.

Market Feedback: Listen to what business owners are asking for and relay that back to the development team to help us build the next generation of AI Agents.

What We Are Looking For:

Coachability is King: We value the ability to learn over a 10-page resume. You must be willing to train with Briggs and adapt your approach.

Tech-Savvy Mindset: You don't need to be a coder, but you must be excited about AI and comfortable navigating software.

Problem-Solving Skills: You need to be able to listen to a business owner complain about a task and immediately think, "I have an Agent for that."

Communication: Clear, confident verbal and written communication skills are non-negotiable.

GHL Experience: Proficiency in Go High Level is a plus, but not required if you are a fast learner.

Why Join Cynergists?

Cutting-Edge Training: Access to Briggs, our AI Sales Trainer, providing you with real-time feedback and development.

Sell the Future: You aren't selling outdated services; you are selling the most in-demand technology in the world.

Competitive Commission: Uncapped earning potential based on performance.

Remote Freedom: Work from anywhere with a supportive, innovative team.

To Apply: If you are ready to pivot your career into the world of Artificial Intelligence, submit your resume to 
 us why you think AI is the future of business in your cover letter.

title: Ad Creative Assistant (Content Editing & Social Posting)
description:
Ad Creative Assistant (Content Editing & Social Posting – 2 Brands)

________________________________________

Job Overview

We are hiring a Creative Assistant to help edit existing photos/videos and turn them into usable marketing content.

You will be working across TWO brands:

1. eCommerce brand (established, 10+ years) selling water filtration and plumbing supplies — primary focus 

2. Local plumbing service (new startup) — secondary, lighter workload 

This is a production-focused role, not a design or strategy role.

________________________________________

Important: Multi-Brand Responsibility

This role requires you to:

• Work across two different brands 

• Follow different styles and content patterns for each 

• Stay organized and consistent when switching between brands 

We will provide:

• Clear examples 

• Templates 

• Guidelines 

Your role is to follow and apply each brand correctly, not create from scratch.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

Content Editing

• Resize and crop images/videos for: 

o Social media 
, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, X) 

o Ads (Meta, Google, TikTok) 

o Website use (Shopify) 

• Create simple variations (text overlays, formatting) 

• Cut and edit short clips from longer videos 

________________________________________

Video Review & Clip Selection

• Review longer raw videos and identify usable highlights 

• Select key 
nts that can be turned into short-form content 

• Create short clips for social media (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) 

• Focus on clear, useful segments (no over-editing required) 

________________________________________

Social Media Posting

• Post content on a fixed schedule 

• Follow provided templates and examples 

• Maintain consistency for both brands 

________________________________________

Content Organization

• Organize files in Google Drive/Network Drive

• Maintain clear folder structure and naming 

• Keep assets separated and easy to find per brand 

________________________________________

Light Content Direction

• Provide simple feedback on raw content: 

o Angles 

o Lighting 

o Missing shots 

• Suggest what content is needed (before/after, demo, etc.) 

________________________________________

Branding (Execution-Level Only)

• Follow brand examples and templates 

• Match existing style and formatting 

• Maintain consistency across posts 

You are not required to create branding strategy

________________________________________

Work Allocation

• Primary Focus (~70%) – eCommerce brand 

o Product content and marketing assets 

• Secondary Focus (~30%) – Local plumbing service 

o Simple, consistent social posting 

o Lower complexity 

________________________________________

Requirements

• Detail-oriented and highly organized 

• Able to follow instructions exactly 

• Comfortable managing tasks across multiple brands 

• Fast and responsive in communication 

• Able to recognize patterns and apply them consistently 

• Able to review content and identify useful clips from longer videos 

________________________________________

Tools & Setup (Required)

You must have your own tools and active subscriptions to perform this role.

This includes:

• Canva (Pro preferred) 

• CapCut or equivalent editing software 

• Reliable computer capable of handling image/video editing 

We do not provide software subscriptions for this role.

________________________________________

Work Style Requirement (Important)

This role is best for someone who:

• Prefers clear systems and structure 

• Can handle repeatable tasks across multiple brands 

• Focuses on execution and efficiency 

• Communicates clearly and responds quickly 

This role is NOT suitable if you:

• Prefer creative freedom 

• Like to redesign or change styles frequently 

• Want to create new concepts from scratch 

________________________________________

Asset Ownership, Licensing & File Delivery

All content and assets are the property of the company.

You are required to:

• Provide all final edited files in full resolution 

• Provide source/editable files when applicable (e.g., Canva projects) 

• Upload and organize all assets in our Google Drive/Network Drive 

• Maintain clear file naming and folder structure 

All work created under this role is considered work-for-hire.

The company retains full ownership and licensing rights to all content created, including unrestricted rights to use, modify, distribute, and publish the content.

We must have full access and control of all assets at all times.

No files should be kept privately or withheld.

________________________________________

Compensation

• Long-term position 

• Consistent workload 

________________________________________

Application Questions

To be considered, please answer the following:

1. Provide examples of content you’ve edited 

2. What tools do you use? (include your active subscriptions) 

3. How do you organize files/folders for multiple projects or brands? 

4. If given 20 photos + 5 videos, what is your first step? 

5. How do you improve low-quality content? 

6. If given 5 sample posts, how do you match the style? 

7. Do you prefer following systems or creating your own approach? Why? 

8. How do you manage tasks when working on multiple brands? 

9. Have you worked with long videos before? How do you d
 which parts to clip? 

10. Internet speed + backup plan 

11. Availability (hours/week, timezone) 

________________________________________

Final Note

You will be working across two brands, so organization and consistency are critical.

We are looking for someone who can:

• Follow structure 

• Communicate clearly and respond quickly 

• Stay organized 

• Execute reliably 

• Manage multiple workflows without confusion

title: Web Content Writer
description:
A Web Content Writer specializing in SEO is responsible for creating engaging, high-quality content that improves a website’s visibility in search engines and attracts target audiences. This role involves researching relevant keywords, understanding search intent, and producing optimized content such as website pages, service descriptions, and landing pages. The writer ensures all content is clear, informative, and aligned with the brand’s voice while strategically incorporating keywords, meta descriptions, headers, and internal links to boost search rankings.



Key responsibilities include conducting keyword research, analyzing competitors, and identifying content opportunities that drive organic traffic. The writer collaborates with marketing teams to develop content strategies, update existing pages for better performance, and follow SEO best practices such as proper formatting, readability, and mobile optimization.



A successful SEO Web Content Writer has strong writing and editing skills, a solid understanding of on-page SEO, and the ability to adapt content for different audiences and industries. Attention to detail, creativity, and the ability to meet deadlines are essential. This role plays a critical part in increasing brand awareness, driving website traffic, and converting visitors into customers.

title: Meticulous UX Designer
description:
Are you obsessed with how designs look and feel? Do you believe great design can change lives? Let’s team up.



We believe in people. This is why we only work with clients who serve people. From firefighters, to law firms, to suppliers sending life-saving food to kids dying of malnutrition, the work you do will help make the world a better place.



Our team is made up of people who want to do the best work of their life. People who love to learn, challenge themselves, grow and have some fun along the journey. We also care about each other – we support each other in our own personal goals and vision. We are human beings before employees and we love to bring out the best in each other.



Now, ready to learn more about this opening? Buckle up.



If you work here, you’ll:

- Be challenged to do the best work of your life in a supportive environment.

- Become the best communicator you can become (this is the most important thing we do).

- Have the space to ask questions, voice your feedback, and make a difference.

- Help shape the design of our products from the ground up, participating in stimulating conversations with like-minded people.



What you could be working on:

- Designing intuitive, scalable interfaces for that solve real problems.

- Turning rough ideas, feedback notes, or “brain dumps” into clear user flows, wireframes and mockups that tell a story from start to finish.

- Building and maintaining a thoughtful design system that keeps our tools consistent, accessible, and efficient 

- Working closely with developers throughout implementation, reviewing builds, and fine-tuning details to make sure the final output matches the design intent.

- Refining the small details that elevate the experience, including micro-interactions, states (hover, active, error, empty), spacing, iconography, and motion.

- Simplifying complex workflows by breaking them into logical, digestible steps and removing unnecessary friction wherever possible.

- Contributing to product discussions early by challenging assumptions, suggesting alternative approaches, and advocating for the user perspective.

- Supporting clear design handoffs with well-organized files, annotated flows, and defined components so the team can build efficiently.



You’ll do well in this job if you:

- Bring at least 3 years of experience with building designs and UX

- Have a strong sense of visual design, always putting usability first. You obsess about how design looks, and you care even more about how they work.

- Communicate clearly and confidently in English, and can walk others through the reasoning behind your design decisions. You don’t just say what looks better, you explain why it solves the problem.

- Enjoy exploring new tools and improving your workflow, whether that’s Figma or anything else that helps you do better work. - You’re naturally helpful and like making collaboration easier for everyone.

- Have clear opinions on best practices, but stay open to feedback. You’re confident in your thinking, yet flexible enough to test, refine, and evolve your ideas.

- Have the persistence to push for a better user experience, even when it takes extra effort. You don’t settle for “good enough” if you know it can be improved.

- Pay close attention to detail. If something is slightly misaligned or inconsistent, you notice it and fix it.

- Can take a rough collection of ideas and turn it into a clear, structured, and polished layout independently. You’re comfortable shaping ambiguity into something concrete.

- Are okay with healthy debate. If something doesn’t serve the user, you’re willing to say so and back it up with solid reasoning.

- Take ownership of handoffs. Your files are clean, layers are organized, and notes are clear so developers and teammates can move quickly without guesswork.

- Approach problems with curiosity. If a button isn’t being clicked or a form isn’t being completed, you want to dig in and understand what’s really going on.



You probably shouldn’t apply if:

- You’re “just looking for extra money.”

- You like working 5 full-time jobs because all you care about is work.

- You get offended easily and take things personally.

- You are not someone with grit and determination who can persevere while being challenged to do great work.

- You get overwhelmed easily, new habits, new learnings and chat messages.



The interview process:

- Since 99% of our work is done via Slack (we don’t do scheduled calls), the entire interview process will be via
. (With lots of questions, sprinkled with a few voice notes)



If you work here:

- You’ll get 13th month salary, Filipino holidays, unlimited time off (we don’t count sick days), a normal working day schedule (no night shifts, although an early start is preferred for time overlap) with some flexibility, a week off during the holidays in December, and the opportunity to grow and become your best self.



A little more about us:

- We’ve been in business for a decade+. Our teams are remote (mostly in the Philippines). Our longest standing tea
mber has been with us for over 14+ years. We've had people quit smoking on our teams with our help, lose weight, learn a new instrument, speak a new language, and more. We all love what we do.



How to begin:

- Your mission, should you choose to accept, is to send us an
 with 3 questions you have about this role. If you’re currently in a full-time role and are looking for something new, we’re open to a transition window. We actually care about your happiness.



NOTE: While we like AI, and we use it in certain circumstances, we ask that no AI be used during communication. Communication is the most important thing we do. If I don't see your natural voice from our first interaction, then you're setting an inaccurate representation of who you are and how you communicate. And when I see that change, it's going to come across as a lack of harmony in how you communicate.

title: Finance & AI Systems Operator (Build Systems, Not Reports)
description:
Are you someone who does not just manage numbers — but builds systems around them?



Residentas is an international hospitality company operating premium properties in Europe and the United States.



We are building one of the most AI-integrated operations in our industry — including our finance function.



This is not a traditional finance role.



We are not looking for a bookkeeper.



We are looking for a Finance & AI Systems Operator — someone who understands financial operations deeply and immediately asks:



- how do I structure this

- how do I automate this

- how do I turn this into decisions



If you think finance is about reports, this role is not for you.



If you think finance is about building systems that drive the business — read on.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING



Financial Operations (Foundation)

- Managing core finance workflows: invoicing, reconciliation, accounts payable/receivable

- Supporting cross-border finance (US & Portugal)

- Working with tools such as Stripe, Guesty, InvoiceXpress

- Liaising with external accountants and tax advisors



Systems & Control (THIS IS THE REAL JOB)

- Connecting and reconciling data across systems

- Identifying inconsistencies and fixing root causes

- Building financial visibility (cash, revenue, costs)

- Flagging risks before they become problems



Automation & AI

- Identifying manual processes and eliminating them

- Building automations (Zapier, Make, etc.)

- Using AI (ChatGPT, Claude) to:

          - analyze financial data

          - improve reporting

          - reduce manual work



Decision Support

- Creating dashboards and scorecards leadership actually uses

- Structuring data so it becomes decision-ready



QUALITIES WE VALUE



-- Financial Rigour: You understand numbers deeply and care about accuracy

-- Systems Thinking: You redesign processes, not just execute them

-- AI Fluency: You actively use AI to improve your work

-- Ownership: You take responsibility and solve problems

-- Judgment: You know when something is wrong — and act



REQUIREMENTS



-- Minimum 2 years experience in finance / accounting / operations

-- Strong Excel / Google Sheets

-- Experience using AI tools in real work

-- Experience with automation tools (Zapier, Make or similar)

-- Strong English

-- Ability to work independently

-- Bonus: cross-border finance, Stripe, dashboards, hospitality



WHAT WILL DISQUALIFY YOU



- No real finance experience

- No examples of systems or automation built

- Generic applications

- Treating finance as data entry



THE BENEFITS



- Salary: 60,000 – 90,000 PHP per month

- Performance bonus based on impact

- 100% remote

- Direct exposure to leadership

- You will build the systems that run the company



HOW TO APPLY



1. Send a message on OnlineJobs with subject: FA1

2. You will receive a link to our application form

3. On the form:

- Complete all fields

- In the comments write: FA1

4. Selected candidates will be invited to:

- Submit a short Loom video (preferred), or a written response (exceptional clarity required)

- Complete a practical test



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.

title: Project Assistant
description:
Are you great at communicating with others? Are you meticulous and organized? Let’s team up.



We believe in people. This is why we only work with clients who serve people. From firefighters, to law firms, to suppliers sending life-saving food to kids dying of malnutrition, the work you do will help make the world a better place.



Our team is made up of people who want to do the best work of their life. People who love to learn, challenge themselves, grow and have some fun along the journey. We also care about each other – we support each other in our own personal goals and vision. We are human beings before employees and we love to bring out the best in each other.



Now, ready to learn more about this opening? Buckle up.



If you work here, you’ll be:

- Challenged to do the best work of your life in a supportive environment.

- Become the best communicator you can become (this is the most important thing we do).

- Have the space to ask questions, voice your feedback and make a difference (and be yourself).

- Help drive our projects and tools, participate in stimulating conversations, and grow with like-minded people.



What you could be working on:

- Oversight of our fast growth projects and understanding the nuances

- Communicate status, progress, ensuring "nothing slips through the cracks"

- Build and voice your opinion on key project features

- Communicate and help developers understand various tasks

- Testing new features to ensure it meets project needs

- Research, engaging customers via
/chat, proof reading, copywriting, organizing events, etc



You’ll do well in this job if you:

- Are a master at the English language and care about writing well

- Enjoy using and learning about technology and being helpful

- Enjoy working with people who actually care about what they do and will not let you be lazy or do sloppy work.

- Have an opinion and care about best practices and love learning and creating and building.

- Have grit and determination and are someone who will exceed no matter what gets in your way.

- Are attentive to details.



You probably shouldn’t apply if:

- You’re “just looking for extra money.”

- You like working 5 full-time jobs because all you care about is work.

- You get offended easily and take things personally.

- You are not someone with grit and determination who can persevere while being challenged to do great work.

- You get overwhelmed easily, new habits, new learnings and chat messages.



The interview process:

- Since 99% of our work is done via Slack (we don’t do scheduled calls), the entire interview process will be via
. (With lots of questions, sprinkled with a few voice notes)



If you work here:

- You’ll get 13th month salary, Filipino holidays, unlimited time off (we don’t count sick days), a normal working day schedule (no night shifts, although an early start is preferred for time overlap) with some flexibility, a week off during the holidays in December, and the opportunity to grow and become your best self.



A little more about us:

- We’ve been in business for a decade+. Our teams are remote (mostly in the Philippines). Our longest standing tea
mber has been with us for over 14+ years. We've had people quit smoking on our teams with our help, lose weight, learn a new instrument, speak a new language, and more. We all love what we do.



How to begin

- Your mission, should you choose to accept, is to send us an
 with 3 questions you have about this role. If you’re currently in a full-time role and are looking for something new, we’re open to a transition window. We actually care about your happiness.



NOTE: While we like AI, and we use it in certain circumstances, we ask that no AI be used during communication. Communication is the most important thing we do. If I don't see your natural voice from our first interaction, then you're setting an inaccurate representation of who you are and how you communicate. And when I see that change, it's going to come across as a lack of harmony in how you communicate.

title: AI Automation & Operations Specialist
description:
We are looking for someone who builds systems using AI — not someone who just uses it.



At Residentas, you will:



+ automate real business processes

+ build AI workflows

+ improve operations across the company



This is not a typical VA role.



If you have already built automations using tools like ChatGPT, Zapier, Make or similar — keep reading.

 

Residentas is an international hospitality company with premium properties in Lisbon and the USA. We are building one of the most AI-integrated operations in the short-term rental space, and we need someone who lives at that frontier with us.

This is not a traditional role. We are not looking for a VA or a marketer or an analyst. We are looking for an AI Generalist -- someone who sees a problem and immediately asks: how do I use AI to solve this better, faster, and at a higher standard than a human team could alone.

 

If you think AI is a tool you use occasionally, this role is not for you. If AI is how you think -- read on.

 

WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING:

+ Identifying repetitive or manual processes across our operations and automating them using AI tools and workflows. +Building internal tools, templates and systems using Claude, ChatGPT, Replit or similar platforms. 

+ Supporting our guest experience, listings,
 funnels and market research with AI-generated output that actually meets a luxury brand standard. 

+ Translating business problems into AI prompts, workflows and solutions -- without waiting to be told how. 

+Documenting what you build so the team can use it without you holding their hand. 

 

QUALITIES WE VALUE:

 

--Systems Thinking: You do not just complete tasks. You redesign them.

 

--AI Fluency: Claude, ChatGPT, Replit, Zapier, Make -- you move between tools and you know when to use which.

 

--Judgment: You know when AI output is good enough and when it is not. You do not ship garbage.

 

--Ownership: You treat problems like they are yours to solve.

 

--Integrity: You say what you think, especially when something is not working.

 

REQUIREMENTS:

 

-- You have used AI tools to build or automate something real -- not just write
s. 

-- Strong written English. Your output will represent a premium brand. 

-- Comfortable learning new platforms fast. We move quickly. 

-- Self-directed. You do not need daily instructions to make progress.

 -- Bonus: experience in hospitality, property management or e-commerce operations.

 

WHAT WILL DISQUALIFY YOU IMMEDIATELY:

 

+Applying without examples of real AI-assisted work you have produced.

+Generic applications that do not follow the instructions below.

+Treating AI as a shortcut rather than a standard-raiser.

 

THE BENEFITS:

 

+Starting pay: 30,000 PHP per month.

 

+100% Remote work.

 

+Direct line to the founder from day one.

 

+You will be building systems that define how this company operates for years.

 

+You will work with tools and methods most companies will not adopt for years.

 

HOW TO APPLY:

Send me a direct message here on OnlineJobs. In the subject line, include the code AG1. I will then send you a link to our official application form. On that form, in the extra comments field, write AG1.

title: Amazon and eBay Business Assistant (Lego Specialist / Online Arbitrage)
description:
Looking for a talented VA with past experience in working with US based Amazon selling. We are seeking a long-term employee who is good at problem solving. 



This is a Part-Time "Trial to Growth" position that will eventually require full-time as the business grows

This is a hybrid role: 50% Product Sourcing (Finding the Gold) and 50?ministrative/Operations (Managing the Machine).

You must be available for 3–4 Zoom calls per week and respond to messages within a few hours during working hours.





Key Responsibilities:



Specialized Sourcing: Use Tactical Arbitrage and manual "Storefront Stalking" to find Lego leads with high ROI and low competition.



Lead Validation: Use Keepa and SellerAmp to analyze price stability and "End of Life" (EOL) potential.



Data Management: Record all leads in Google Sheets with accurate profit calculations (including prep center fees).



eBay Support: Draft listings, edit photos (background removal), and manage customer inquiries for our eBay storefront.



Administrative: Monitor Amazon Account Health daily and assist with shipment reconciliation between our Prep Center and FBA.

 

Look out for and familiarize yourself with market trends in lego





Requirements:

English Fluency: C1 or C2 level (Written and Verbal). You must be able to communicate clearly with Amazon Support and US-based retailers.



Keepa & Tactical Arbitrage (REQUIRED): You must be able to read a Keepa chart like a pro—identifying price tanking, IP complaint patterns, and seasonal spikes.



SellerAmp (Required): Expert at calculating net profit after all fees.



Excel and Google Sheets (Required): Must be familiar and able to use google sheets and excel 



Lego Knowledge (Preferred but not required): Familiarity with Lego themes (Star Wars, Technic, Icons) and the retirement cycle as well as an enjoyment for legos



Communication: Strong written English for handling customer service on eBay and Amazon.



Internet: A stable, high-speed connection is a must.



Mindset: Analytical, proactive, and detail-oriented.





Benefits:



Flexible Schedule: Work whenever you are most productive, provided deadlines are met.



Bi-weekly Payment: Reliable, on-time payments.



Performance Bonuses: We believe in rewarding VAs who find "Deep Buy" leads that result in high-volume profit.



Growth: As the business grows, your role and compensation will grow with it.





How to Apply:

We value attention to detail above all else. To demonstrate that you have read this entire listing and can follow instructions perfectly:



Subject Line: Your application must start with your favorite animal followed by your full name.



Introduction: Tell us about a difficult time in your role as an Amazon VA and how you overcame it.



A brief summary of your experience with Keepa and Tactical Arbitrage.



Have you ever sourced Legos or toys? What is your favorite Lego theme to source and why?



Are you familiar with cross-listing products from Amazon to eBay?



Analysis Test: Briefly explain why we avoid listings where Amazon is a constant seller, even if the ROI looks good. Are there any exceptions where you would still recommend the buy?



Proof: Attach or link your English proficiency results and provide a brief video introduction of yourself.



Applications that do not follow the previous instructions will be automatically disqualified.



We will provide a 30-minute sample sourcing project to qualified candidates. 



Performance-Based Scalability: We are a fast-growing company. As you hit your KPIs (Key Performance Indicators) and help the business scale, your compensation will be reviewed to reflect your impact.



Look forward to hearing from you and hope to work together soon.

title: Transaction Coordinator / Administrative Assistant - land investing
description:
BT LAND GROUP

Job Description



Position: Transaction Coordinator / Administrative Assistant

Reports To: Owner

Location: Remote (Virtual Assistant)

Schedule: Part-Time to Start (20–30 hrs/wk), Full-Time Potential

Probationary Period: 60 Days



About BT Land Group



BT Land Group is a real estate investment company specializing in the acquisition and resale of vacant land across most U.S. mainland states. We source off-market deals through data-driven outreach, purchase at a discount, take title, and list on the MLS for resale. As our deal volume grows, we need a detail-oriented, proactive person to keep the back end of our operation running flawlessly—from signed purchase agreement to closed deal, and all the administrative work that keeps the machine moving in between.



Role Overview



The Transaction Coordinator / Admin is the backbone of BT Land Group's operations. Once our Acquisitions Manager gets a purchase agreement signed, you take the deal from there—coordinating with title companies, managing escrow timelines, tracking documents, and ensuring every deal crosses the closing table on schedule. On the administrative side, you'll also be responsible for pulling county data and running skip traces to feed our marketing pipeline, maintaining CRM hygiene, and supporting the team with day-to-day operational tasks. This hybrid role requires someone who is extremely organized, detail-obsessed, and comfortable managing multiple priorities across different stages of the business at once.



Key Responsibilities



Transaction Coordination (Post-Contract to Close)



- Manage the full closing process from signed purchase agreement through to successful closing: coordinate with title companies, real estate attorneys, and escrow agents across multiple states.

- Order title searches, review title commitments, and proactively flag any issues (liens, encumbrances, boundary disputes, back taxes) for resolution before they delay closing.

- Prepare, send, track, and organize all closing documents—purchase agreements, addendums, assignments, deeds, settlement statements, and any required disclosures.

- Serve as the primary point of contact for sellers during the closing process: keep them informed on timeline, answer questions, and resolve concerns promptly and professionally.

- Maintain and monitor closing timelines and critical deadlines for every active deal—ensure nothing slips through the cracks.

- Coordinate wire transfers and funding logistics with title/escrow and confirm successful recording and closing of each transaction.

- Maintain a real-time closing tracker in Stride CRM with current status, next steps, and any blockers for every deal in the pipeline.



Data, Skip Tracing, and Administrative Support



- Pull county data lists and property records from relevant sources to feed the SMS marketing and cold calling campaigns.

- Run skip tracing on property owner lists to obtain current, accurate phone numbers,
 addresses, and mailing addresses.

- Clean, deduplicate, organize, and upload data lists into Smarter Contacts and Stride CRM for the marketing and calling teams.

- Maintain CRM data integrity: update deal statuses, clean up duplicate or outdated records, and ensure information flows accurately across the pipeline.

- Handle general administrative tasks including
 management, document organization, scheduling, and file management in Google Drive.

- Support the team with ad-hoc operational needs as the business scales—this role will evolve as we grow.



Requirements



- Prior experience as a transaction coordinator, real estate administrative assistant, or virtual assistant in a real estate environment (required).

- Exceptional organizational skills and meticulous attention to detail—you catch errors before they become problems.

- Comfortable managing multiple active transactions and administrative workstreams simultaneously without losing track of deadlines.

- Strong written communication skills for professional correspondence with title companies, escrow agents, attorneys, sellers, and team members.

- Experience with data entry, list management, and skip tracing workflows (or demonstrated ability to learn quickly).

- Self-motivated and proactive—you anticipate what needs to happen next rather than waiting to be told.

- Reliable internet connection and availability during U.S. business hours for coordination with title companies, escrow, and sellers.



Preferred Qualifications



- Experience with land transactions specifically—understanding of deeds, title nuances, and rural property closings (not just residential houses).

- Familiarity with CRM systems (Stride, Podio, REsimpli, or similar) and deal pipeline management.

- Experience with skip tracing platforms and county-level property data sources.

- Familiarity with Land ID, Land Portal, or similar property research and due diligence tools.

- Prior experience coordinating with title companies and escrow agents across multiple states simultaneously.



Compensation & Benefits



- Competitive hourly compensation based on experience and skill level.

- Performance-based bonus potential tied to deals successfully closed on time, data quality and throughput, and overall operational efficiency.

- Starts part-time (20–30 hours/week) with a 60-day probationary period. Strong performers will have the opportunity to transition to full-time (40 hours/week).

- Training on BT Land Group's closing process, data workflows, CRM systems, and land investing fundamentals.

- Clear path for pay growth and expanded responsibilities as deal volume increases and the operation scales.



How to Apply



Interested candidates should submit their resume along with a brief message covering the following:



- Your relevant experience in transaction coordination, real estate admin, or virtual assistant work.

- Your experience with data management, skip tracing, or list building (if applicable).

- A recording of yourself on a call. If you don't have an existing recording, please send a short clip of yourself introducing yourself as if you were speaking to a potential seller for the first time.

- Your availability (hours per week and time zone).

- Your favorite food.



BT Land Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer.

title: Acquisitions Manager - land Investing
description:
BT LAND GROUP

Job Description



Position: Acquisitions Manager

Reports To: Owner

Location: Remote (Virtual Assistant)

Schedule: Part-Time to Start (20–30 hrs/wk), Full-Time Potential

Probationary Period: 60 Days



About BT Land Group



BT Land Group is a real estate investment company focused on acquiring and reselling vacant land across most U.S. mainland states. We source off-market deals through high-volume SMS campaigns, cold calling, and data-driven targeting, purchase at a discount, take title, and list on the MLS for immediate resale. Our pipeline generates a steady flow of qualified seller leads—and we need a skilled Acquisitions Manager who can turn those conversations into signed contracts.



Role Overview



The Acquisitions Manager is our closer and the primary revenue driver on the team. You'll take warm, pre-qualified leads that have been vetted by the Lead Manager and SMS Marketer, and convert them into signed purchase agreements. You'll handle Call 1s—where you anchor pricing, build rapport, gather remaining property and motivation details, and uncover the seller's target price—and Call 2s—where you present or refine your offer, overcome objections, negotiate final terms, and get the contract signed. You will handle follow up on fallout leads as well. You need to be confident, consultative, and skilled at reading people over the phone. This role has a direct, measurable impact on the company's bottom line.



Key Responsibilities



- Conduct Call 1s with qualified sellers: anchor pricing using proven frameworks, build rapport, gather remaining property and motivation details, and uncover the seller's target price to assess deal viability.

- Conduct Call 2s: present or refine offers, negotiate final terms, overcome objections, address seller concerns, and close deals by getting purchase agreements signed.

-Ability to reengage older offers

- Review all lead information, due diligence notes, and prior conversation history in Stride CRM before each call to be fully prepared and avoid redundant questions.

- Use Land ID, Land Portal, and supporting tools to verify property details, pull comps, and confirm deal viability during and between calls.

- Structure offers based on BT Land Group's buy box and pricing guidelines—factoring in market value, target spread, close timeline, acreage, and deal size.

- Work closely with the Lead Manager to ensure leads are properly qualified and all necessary information is captured before calls are scheduled.

- Update Stride CRM with detailed call outcomes, negotiation notes, offer details, and deal status after every seller interaction.

- Track personal KPIs including calls taken, offers made, contracts signed, and conversion rates; actively work to improve performance over time.

- Share feedback with leadership on lead quality trends, common seller objections, and market observations to help refine the overall acquisition strategy.



Requirements



- Proven experience in sales, negotiations, or acquisitions—ideally in real estate investing or land (required).

- Strong phone presence: confident, professional, consultative, and able to control the direction and pace of a negotiation call.

- Skilled in negotiation techniques such as anchoring, looping, motivational interviewing, or similar consultative selling approaches.

- Ability to quickly analyze deal economics: market value, offer price, spread, close timeline, and risk factors.

- Comfortable handling objections and guiding sellers through concerns about pricing, process, and timeline with empathy and professionalism.

- Highly organized—able to manage multiple active negotiations at different stages without letting details slip.

- Self-driven, competitive, and results-oriented; motivated by closing deals and exceeding targets.

- Reliable internet connection, a quiet and professional workspace, and availability during U.S. business hours for seller calls.



Preferred Qualifications



- Direct experience in land acquisitions, real estate wholesaling, or land flipping.

- Deep understanding of vacant land valuation: comps, zoning, buildability, road access, utilities, wetlands, flood zones, and slope/terrain analysis.

- Experience using CRM platforms (Stride is bonus) and deal pipeline tracking systems.

- Familiarity with Land ID, Land Portal, or similar property research and due diligence tools.

- Demonstrated track record of closing deals and exceeding acquisition or sales targets in a remote environment.



Compensation & Benefits



- Competitive hourly compensation based on experience and skill level.

- Performance-based bonus structure tied directly to contracts signed, deal volume, and acquisition quality.

- Starts part-time (20–30 hours/week) with a 60-day probationary period. Strong performers will have the opportunity to transition to full-time (40 hours/week).

- Training on BT Land Group's acquisition process, negotiation frameworks, pricing strategy, and deal structure.

- Significant opportunity for pay growth and expanded bonus potential as deal volume and responsibilities increase.



How to Apply



Interested candidates should submit their resume along with a brief message covering the following:



- Your relevant experience in sales, negotiations, or real estate acquisitions.

- A brief example of a deal you've closed or a negotiation you're proud of.

- A recording of yourself on a call. If you don't have an existing recording, please send a short clip of yourself introducing yourself as if you were speaking to a potential seller for the first time.

- Your availability (hours per week and time zone).

- Your favorite food.



BT Land Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer.

title: eCommerce Video Editor
description:
We’re looking for a high-performance Video Editor to join our fast-growing pet supplement eCommerce brands.



This role is 100% focused on creating high-converting ads using AI tools. You’ll be responsible for turning creative briefs into finished ads across formats like VSL, UGC, and animation—at speed and scale.



This is not a traditional editing role. All creatives are AI-powered, so strong experience with AI tools is a must.



This is a full-time role (Monday–Friday) with consistent daily output expectations.



Who Are We?



We build high-growth ecommerce brands in the pet space, creating products that improve the health and happiness of dogs.



Our growth is driven by direct response marketing and high-volume creative output. We move fast, test aggressively, and scale what works.



Culture & Fit



We operate with a simple mindset:



- Speed > perfection

- Results > effort

- Constant iteration



This is a high-performance environment. If you want a slow, predictable 9–5, this isn’t it.



If you want to:



- Work directly with founders

- Produce work that directly impacts revenue

- Rapidly level up your skillset



You’ll fit right in.



Key Responsibilities:

- Turn creative briefs into high-converting video ads

- Produce VSL, UGC, and AI-generated ads

- Edit and iterate ads based on performance data

- Deliver 2+ completed briefs per day (minimum requirement)

- Collaborate with the team on creative improvements and new concepts

- Continuously optimize for CTR, CPA, and ROAS



Requirements:

- 3+ years experience editing for ecommerce / direct response

- Proven experience with:

- VSL ads

- UGC ads

- Animation-based creatives



Strong AI skillset (MANDATORY):

- Higgsfield

- HeyGen

- ElevenLabs



- Fluent English

- Strong understanding of performance-driven creatives

- Ability to work quickly and execute without constant oversight



Important:

We expect editors to use strong judgment and common sense when bringing briefs to life. Your first version should already be clean, on-brief, and conversion-focused—not something that requires heavy back-and-forth.



This is a high-output environment, so minimal revisions should be needed.



Preferred (not required):

- Experience with Slack

- Experience with Asana



Accountability Metrics:

- Minimum 2 completed ad briefs per day

- Consistent production of high-quality, testable creatives

- Low revision rates (high first-pass quality)

- Contribution to improving key ad metrics (CTR, CPA, ROAS)

- Speed, reliability, and execution



Compensation:

- $1,200 – $2,000/month (base)

- Performance-based bonuses tied to output and results



How We Hire

- Initial interview

- Test project

- Final interview (culture + performance fit)



We move fast and aim to hire within 7–10 days.



How to Apply



To be considered, please submit the following:

- 1–5 minute Loom video introducing yourself and walking through your experience with ecommerce ad creatives (show examples if possible)

- Your CV / Resume

- Answers to the screening questions below:



Screening Questions

- How many years of experience do you have as an eCommerce video editor?

- Are you proficient in using AI tools to develop ads?

If yes, list the tools you use and how you use them (e.g. Higgsfield, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, etc.)



Important

- Applications that appear AI-generated or generic will be ignored

- You must include the phrase “BLUE CAT” somewhere in your application to confirm you’ve read this fully



Final Note



This role is for someone who thrives in high-output, fast-paced environments and can consistently deliver high-quality creatives with minimal hand-holding.

title: Senior Operations Manager
description:
About the Company



We are a done-for-you Airbnb arbitrage company. We help clients build profitable short-term rental

portfolios without owning property — we handle everything from sourcing and leasing units to

furnishing, listing, and managing them on their behalf. We are a fast-growing team with a high-volume

sales operation and a fulfillment team responsible for delivering results to clients.



About the Role



We are looking for a sharp, proactive Senior Operations Manager to own our day-to-day operations.

You will be the person who makes sure nothing falls through the cracks — so that the owner doesn't

have to.

You will manage a data entry VA, coordinate between our sales team and fulfillment team, QA reports

and agreements, build systems and automations, and ensure that every operational task gets done

without being asked twice. If you need to be told to follow up on something,  this is not the right role for

you. If you solve problems before they become fires, this is exactly the right role.



What You'll Own Day-to-Day



• Review daily sales and marketing reports for accuracy before they reach the owner. Flag and fix

discrepancies before they're reported.

• Monitor end-of-day closer reports. If a closer hasn't submitted or something looks off, investigate

independently (check Zoom recordings, CRM, etc.) before escalating.

• Audit every new client agreement to confirm the correct version was signed. If an agreement is

missing or incorrect, chase it to completion with the closer — without involving the owner.

• Coordinate AR and payment collection: track upcoming client payments, confirm billing details

with the sales team, ensure payments are run on schedule, and resolve any blockers

independently.

• Coordinate between the sales team and the fulfillment team on new client onboarding — making

sure every new Airbnb arbitrage client is handed off cleanly with all documents, payments, and

next steps in order.

• Manage and direct the data entry VA: assign tasks clearly, check her work, and correct errors

before they reach leadership.

• Build and document SOPs for recurring processes. Proactively identify gaps and create

solutions.

• Set up and maintain automations using tools like Zapier, Make, or GoHighLevel to reduce

manual work.



You Are the Right Fit If...



• You have 3+ years of experience as a VA, operations coordinator, online business manager, or

similar role for a US/AU/UK-based online business.

• You have managed or supervised at least one other tea
mber.

• You are extremely comfortable with Google Sheets (formulas, data validation, conditional

formatting).

• You have experience with CRM tools, project management platforms, and/or automation tools.

• You are a native or near-native English writer — clear, professional, and direct.

• You don't wait to be told. When you see a problem, you figure out the next step and take it.

• You are available to work EST hours full time 



Nice to Have



• Experience with GoHighLevel, ClickUp, Notion, Slack, or similar tools.

• Background in high-ticket sales, coaching, or consulting businesses.

• Experience building Zapier or Make automations from scratch.



What This Is NOT



• This is not a data entry role. You will manage someone who does data entry.

• This is not a role for someone who needs hand-holding or constant direction.

• This is not part time



Compensation



$1,200 – $1,800 USD/month depending on experience. Performance-based raises available after 90

days. 



How to Apply

fill out this link here->

title: Lead Generation Specialist (High Ownership Role)
description:
We are hiring a Lead Generation Specialist to support a growing plant-based chef business.

This is a high-ownership, strategic role focused entirely on lead generation.

You will be responsible for managing the full lead flow from start to finish, while thinking critically, identifying opportunities, and taking initiative.



Responsibilities

Research and identify qualified, aligned leads

Initiate and manage conversations across platforms

Qualify leads and move them toward booking

Follow up consistently and intentionally

Manage and track all leads inside GoHighLevel CRM

Keep pipelines organized, updated, and moving

Identify gaps, missed opportunities, and areas for improvement



Requirements

Strong, hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (non-negotiable)

Proven experience managing the full lead generation cycle

Strong communication, judgment, and decision-making skills

Ability to take ownership without being managed step by step

Experience with outreach, follow-ups, and lead nurturing



How You’ll Work

This role requires someone who can think and operate independently.

You are expected to:

Bring ideas, not just execution

Think through problems and suggest solutions

Take responsibility for results, not just tasks

Communicate clearly and consistently

This role requires an executive-level mindset applied to lead generation, meaning structure, clarity, and proactive thinking in everything you do.



Work Setup

Part-time or full time

Fixed hours with MST overlap

Daily check-ins and end-of-day updates required

Compensation

$8–$12/hour depending on experience

Opportunity to grow into a larger role over time based on performance



To Be Considered

This role requires initiative, attention to detail, and the ability to think independently.

If instructions are not followed exactly, your application will not be reviewed.

Record a short video and answer the following:

1. Introduction

Who you are and what kind of work you’ve done related to lead generation, outreach, or similar roles.

2. Strategy

Based on what you see about Iwacu Flavors, how would you approach lead generation for this business?

Be specific.

3. Communication

What is your favorite food, and how would you describe it in a way that makes someone want it?



Avoid general answers. We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Lead Manager for REI Seller Leads | Follow-Up, CRM, Appointment Setting
description:
We are hiring a Lead Manager for our real estate acquisitions business.



This is not a closer role.



Your job is to:



respond quickly to new seller leads

follow up consistently

work the CRM hard

identify seller motivation

set quality appointments for acquisitions

keep clean notes and next steps in the CRM



You are the buffer between junk and gold.



What success looks like in this role:



fast speed-to-lead

consistent follow-up

strong CRM discipline

clean notes

quality appointments without overqualifying everything



You will be speaking with seller leads and identifying the 4 pillars of the deal:



why

timeline

repairs

price



Hours: 30–40 hours per week

Timezone requirement: Must overlap with U.S. Eastern business hours



Pay: $5–$7/hour + performance bonuses



Bonuses are based on:



kept appointments

contracts sourced from your pipeline

note quality

speed to lead

follow-up consistency



Requirements:



strong spoken and written English

warm and easy-to-listen-to phone presence

coachable

organized

comfortable with accountability

comfortable making a high volume of calls and follow-ups

able to write clean CRM notes

reliable internet

quiet work environment

headset for calls



Nice to have:



CRM experience (GoHighLevel, ReSimpli, or similar)

REI lead management or seller lead experience

appointment setting experience

familiarity with wholesaling or off-market acquisitions



To apply, send all of the following:



Your resume

A 1–2 minute voice recording introducing yourself and explaining your lead management experience

Your timezone and availability during U.S. Eastern hours

A short sample CRM note from this situation:

Seller inherited property, wants to sell in 2 months, roof is old, house needs paint and flooring, wants $180k, brother is involved

Answer these questions:

What is the difference between a lead manager and an acquisitions closer?

What are the 4 most important things to uncover before setting an appointment?

A seller says, “I’m not ready for an offer yet, but I might sell in the next 30–60 days.” What would you do next?



Important: In the first line of your application, write: “I understand this is not a closer role.”



Applications missing any of the above will be rejected.

title: Full Stack Developer
description:
Full Stack AI Developer

About Cynergists: Cynergists builds production-grade AI Agents that automate real business operations. We design systems that replace manual workflows, eliminate bottlenecks, and scale execution without adding headcount. We do not sell ideas, prompts, or experiments. We deploy working infrastructure. Our focus is simple: intelligent automation that ships, runs, and delivers measurable outcomes.

The Role

We are looking for a highly capable Full Stack AI Developer who excels at building and deploying scalable, front-to-back web applications and autonomous AI agents.

In this role, you will be the architectural bridge between our user-facing interfaces and our backend AI operations. You will build lightning-fast frontends using React and Vite, manage robust databases with Supabase, and orchestrate complex, autonomous AI workflows using n8n. If you are a builder who thrives on shipping real-world AI infrastructure and taking total ownership of your stack, we want you on our team.

Must Haves & Key Responsibilities

Front-End Engineering: Proven experience building highly responsive, production-ready interfaces using React and Vite. You build clean, fast, and maintainable user experiences.

Backend & Database Ownership: Hands-on experience architecting and managing databases using Supabase. You understand schema design, authentication, and secure data handling.

Workflow Orchestration: Deep tactical knowledge of n8n. You will design, build, and deploy complex AI workflows that connect our internal tools, external APIs, and LLMs.

AI Agent Construction: You don't just use AI; you build it. You have demonstrable experience constructing, prompting, and deploying autonomous AI Agents to solve specific operational bottlenecks.

Rapid Prototyping: Experience using Lovable to accelerate front-end development and iterate quickly on user interfaces.

Shipping Mentality: You push code through GitHub with proper reviews. You ship working systems weekly, take ownership of outcomes, and are comfortable being accountable for what runs in production.

Requirements

Demonstrable proficiency in React, Vite, Supabase, and n8n.

Experience building and deploying functional AI Agents.

Comfort working in GitHub using branching, pull requests, and code reviews.

Ability to manage work with clear tickets, acceptance criteria, and milestones.

Clear written and verbal communication.

Availability to work with consistent overlap during US business hours.

A Day in the Life

Turn loosely defined operational problems into working AI-driven workflows and sleek user interfaces.

Design and build AI agents that handle intake, processing, storage, notifications, and reporting.

Write clean, production-grade frontend code using React and Vite.

Manage backend data structures and user authentication flows via Supabase.

Map out and deploy complex automation sequences within n8n.

Push code through GitHub and deliver predictable, demoable outcomes.

About the Team Cynergists is a small, senior, execution-first team. There are no passengers here. Everyone builds, ships, and owns what they deploy. We value:

Direct communication

Reliability over cleverness

Working systems over theoretical ones

Accountability without micromanagement

If you are tired of half-built ideas and want to ship AI systems that actually work, you will fit in.

To Apply Send the following to 

Your availability during US hours and whether you want part-time or full-time work.

One to three examples of systems or AI Agents you have shipped (GitHub links, demos, walkthroughs, or screenshots).

A brief explanation of how you would architect a solution utilizing React, Supabase, and n8n.

title: Experienced Real Estate Transaction Coordinator (Florida Market)
description:

-Ensure all documents are complete, compliant, and submitted on time

-Track deadlines, contingencies, and critical dates

-Provide consistent updates to all stakeholders

-Maintain organized and up-to-date transaction files



Requirements:

-Proven ability to independently manage transactions from start to finish

-Advanced knowledge and hands-on experience with Sisu and Follow Up Boss (FUB)

-Strong understanding of Florida real estate contracts and processes

-Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills

-High attention to detail and problem-solving ability

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills



What We’re Looking For:

To Apply:

We are looking for someone who can start immediately and make an impact from day one.

title: Bilingual Spanish-English Virtual Assistant for Calls, Sales, and Customer Support

This is a phone and customer support role for a flower business, and we are looking for someone who is professional, friendly, persuasive, and good at helping customers place orders.



This is not just a basic support role. We want someone who can **answer calls, guide customers, recommend products, help close sales, and create a great customer experience**.



We are hiring for both **part-time and full-time positions**.



**What You’ll Do:**

* Help customers with product questions, pricing, pickup, and delivery

* Collect order details such as flower count, colors, date, time, and delivery address

* Recommend larger and better arrangements when appropriate

* Send photos or website links to help customers choose

* Provide delivery quotes

* Confirm totals and ask for payment method

* Follow a call script and sales process

**We’re Looking For Someone Who:**

* Has experience in sales, customer support, or call center work

* Can follow systems and scripts while still sounding human

* Is confident handling calls, texts, and customer objections

* Remote

* Must have reliable internet and a quiet workspace

**Application Instructions:**

title: Direct Response Video Editor for Facebook Ads
description:

This is a 40-hour-per-week position where you’ll work in a fast-paced, collaborative environment to deliver content that drives conversions and enhances our brand’s impact.

Understand Marketing Metrics: Develop performance-driven content tailored to maximise ROAS, CTR, and conversions.

title: Cold Email & LinkedIn Outreach Specialist (Smartlead, Heyreach, Zapmail)
description:
Algominds is a London-based AI sales company hiring a Cold
 & LinkedIn Outreach Specialist based in the Philippines to manage and optimize outreach campaigns across our client accounts.



This is a hands-on execution role. You will be building, managing, and optimizing cold
 and LinkedIn outreach campaigns daily using specific tools. This is not a general VA role.



YOU MUST HAVE DIRECT EXPERIENCE WITH THESE THREE PLATFORMS:



1. Smartlead.ai — campaign setup, mailbox rotation, lead management, warmup settings, master inbox management

2. 
 — LinkedIn automation, multi-sender campaigns, connection requests, messaging sequences

3. Zapmail.ai — domain setup, mailbox provisioning, DNS configuration, deliverability management



If you have not used all three of these tools, please do not apply. We will verify your experience on our onboarding call.



WHAT THE ROLE INVOLVES:



Build and launch cold
 campaigns in Smartlead across multiple client workspaces. Set up and manage LinkedIn outreach sequences in Heyreach. Provision and maintain
 infrastructure including domains, mailboxes, and DNS records in Zapmail. Monitor deliverability metrics, bounce rates, and warmup health daily. Manage lead uploads, list segmentation, and campaign targeting. Respond to and categorize replies in Smartlead master inbox. A/B test subject lines, copy, and sending schedules to improve open and reply rates. Report weekly on campaign performance across all client accounts. Coordinate with our London-based team via Slack.



COMPENSATION:



$300 per month base salary paid via Wise on the 1st of every month. Performance bonuses based on campaign metrics including reply rates and meetings booked. Top performers managing multiple client accounts earn $700 to $1,000+ per month. No cap on bonuses.



REQUIREMENTS:



Based in the Philippines. Proven hands-on experience with Smartlead.ai, 
, and Zapmail.ai. This is non-negotiable. Understanding of
 deliverability including SPF, DKIM, DMARC, domain reputation, and inbox placement. Experience writing or editing cold
 copy and LinkedIn messaging sequences. Comfortable managing multiple client campaigns simultaneously. Excellent written English. Reliable internet connection and laptop or PC. Wise account or willingness to create one. Available during overlapping hours with UK timezone for weekly check-ins.



PREFERRED BUT NOT REQUIRED:



Experience with Clay, Instantly, Lemlist, or similar outreach tools. Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator. Experience working in an agency environment managing multiple client accounts. Understanding of B2B lead generation and ICP targeting.



IN YOUR APPLICATION PLEASE INCLUDE:



1. Which of the three tools Smartlead, Heyreach, and Zapmail you have the most experience with and for how long

2. A brief example of campaign results you have achieved such as open rates, reply rates, or meetings booked

3. How many client accounts or campaigns you have managed at once



Generic applications that do not address these three points will not be reviewed.

if you think you are a great a fit for our company, please

title: Assistant Sales Manager - For U.S. Cleaning Company
description:
Assistant Sales Manager (Remote)– Two Maids of Milwaukee 



Remote | Part-Time (25–30 hrs/week) | Growth Opportunity  



About Us:



Two Maids of Milwaukee is a family-owned residential cleaning company based in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. We offer a full range of home cleaning services — from routine weekly maintenance to thorough top-to-bottom deep cleans. Recently recognized by Inc. Magazine as the nation's fastest growing cleaning company, we're proud of the 
ntum we've built and the culture we've maintained along the way. 



At Two Maids, we believe in putting family first — both for the customers we serve and the team we're building. Our growth creates real opportunities for people who want to be part of something meaningful and take pride in their work. If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you. 



The Role:



We're looking for a motivated and personable Assistant Sales Manager to join our team. In this role, you'll be remote and the first point of contact for potential customers — helping them find the right cleaning service and guiding them through the process of becoming a Two Maids client. 



This is a great fit for someone who genuinely enjoys talking with people, stays organized under pressure, and takes ownership of their work without needing to be micromanaged. 



This is not your average sales role. You’ll have a hand in nearly every part of our business — including managing customer support and helping with additional administrative duties in the office. We’re looking for someone who’s excited about taking ownership of day-to-day sales, operations and growing into a leadership role as we scale. 





 

What You'll Be Doing:



Managing inbound leads through our CRM system and ensuring they are placed in the correct action plans 



Calling, texting, and
ing leads to discuss cleaning options and convert them into customers 



Scheduling in-home consultations for prospective clients based on management and ownership schedules 



Keeping the CRM database organized, accurate, and up to date 



Potential creative outlet to create action plans that you feel are better suited for our leads 



Providing excellent customer service to current and prospective clients 



Supporting general office tasks as needed, with room to grow into additional responsibilities over time 



 



What We're Looking For: 



Fluent in American English with strong spoken and written communication skills 



Prior experience in sales and/or customer support 



Comfortable managing CRM systems and lead pipelines 



Confident and personable on the phone — you enjoy talking to people 



Self-motivated and proactive; you thrive working independently in a remote setting 



Detail-oriented, empathetic, patient, and a clear communicator 



Equipped with a reliable computer, strong internet connection, and a quiet home workspace 



 

Compensation & Benefits:



Pay: $8/hour, paid bi-weekly 



Hours: 25–30 hours per week; room to grow into full-time if wanted 



Performance: Potential for pay increases based on performance and growth 



Health Stipend: $25/week toward health insurance and government contributions 



13th Month Pay: Included (prorated in your first year) 



Paid Time Off: 20 paid days off per year (available after 6 months) + 8 U.S. holidays 





How to Apply:



To be considered for this position, please send a one-minute voice recording introducing yourself using Vocaroo and include the link in your application. 



Address your recording directly to Steve — I'm pretty laid back, so feel free to be conversational and let your personality shine through. Strong spoken English is one of the most important parts of this role, and we appreciate your understanding of this requirement. 



Application Deadline: Friday, May 1st 



Two Maids of Milwaukee is a family-owned business that values people, growth, and doing great work. We look forward to meeting you

CRM & Reporting

- Log conversations and update records in the CRM

- Share notes and insights with the acquisitions team



Process Adherence

- Follow call workflows and company processes

- Provide feedback on messaging and lead quality



Collaboration

- Communicate with the team through internal chat

- Stay aligned with acquisition goals and pipeline targets



Attendance & Performance

- Hubstaff Monitoring: Tracks time, activity, and screenshots

- Punctuality is crucial: 3-strike rule. No-call/no-show = termination

- Communication: Active communication in GChat is expected



Role Requirements:



Experience

- Required: Real estate experience

- Required: At least 6 months of outbound sales or cold calling experience



Reliable Work Setup

- Hard-wired internet connection (Ethernet) required for call quality and system performance

- High-speed internet

- Working camera

- Noise-canceling headset

title: Community Development Representative  Coron, Palawan
description:
We are hiring Community Development Representatives in five destinations across the

Philippines — Siargao, El Nido, Coron, Bohol and Panglao, and Boracay. This posting is for

Coron, Palawan.



This is not a typical sales role — and not a tech role either. The ideal person for this position is

part presenter, part community builder, part trusted local presence. You will be the face of this

effort — embedded in the hospitality and tourism community, genuinely invested in the success

of the people you work with, and comfortable introducing her to a community of business

owners who’ve never seen anything like her before.



Lani sells herself. Your job will be to get in front of people — and we will support you in that —

tell the story well, demonstrate something remarkable in real time, and build the kind of

relationships that make people want to say yes — and want to bring their friends along too.

This role comes with two possible growth paths. Some people are natural community builders

who thrive by going deeper in one territory — expanding their client base, strengthening their

community roots, and growing their income steadily over time. Others have leadership

ambitions and want to mentor new ambassadors, oversee multiple territories, and grow into a

regional role. Both paths are equally valued here. You choose the one that fits who you are

today — and that path can evolve as your life and experience develop.



What You Will Do

• Identify and attend local hospitality gatherings, tourism council meetings, DOT events,

restaurant association events, surf operator meetups, and industry get-togethers where

independent business owners congregate

• Deliver a compelling group presentation to rooms of boutique hotel owners, restaurant

operators, surf schools, and activity operators — live, interactive, and anchored in their

specific numbers — including a live demonstration of Lani being activated in real time in

front of the room

• Walk individual prospects through a one-on-one demonstration that shows the specific

revenue their business is currently leaving on the table — Lani does the heavy lifting,

your job is to start the conversation

• Build genuine relationships with independent business owners across the tourism

economy — before, during, and long after they become clients

• Ensure existing clients feel well served and are getting real value — staying present in

the relationship not just at the point of sale

• Introduce clients to the opportunity of joining a growing community of independent

operators — warmly and without pressure — and nurture that community as it develops

• Attend local hospitality and tourism events as a genuine community presence — not as

a vendor but as someone who belongs there

• Have regular conversations with the founder to share what you are learning and to get

support on whatever arises — whether it is a tough situation, an unexpected opportunity,

or simply something worth thinking through together

• Report weekly on conversations, feedback, and market insights

• Follow whichever growth path fits you — deepen your territory over time or grow into a

leadership role as the team expands across the Philippines



What We Are Looking For

Experience and background

We are looking for someone who already belongs to this community — or could walk into it

tomorrow and feel completely at home. The ideal background, in order of priority:



• First priority — hospitality and tourism: experience with boutique hotels, resorts, or

guesthouses as an owner, manager, or guest relations professional. You understand the

world of the independent hotel owner from the inside.

• Second priority — food and beverage: experience with restaurants, cafes, or bars in a

tourism destination. You know the pressures of running a small F&B operation and the

pain of missed reservations and unanswered messages.

• Third priority — surf schools and activity operators: familiarity with the surf and outdoor

activity community. You know the operators, the culture, and the seasonal rhythms.

• Also valued — dive shops and vacation rental operators. Any experience in these

industries is a genuine plus.

• Based in or willing to be deeply and consistently present in your destination

• Comfortable speaking in front of a group — you don’t need to be a professional

presenter but you need to be someone people enjoy listening to

• Existing relationships within the local business community is a significant advantage

• Comfortable with WhatsApp,
, and basic digital tools — you don’t need to be

technical but technology shouldn’t rattle you

• English proficiency — written and spoken



Personal qualities — these matter more than your resume

We don’t expect any candidate to embody all of these perfectly. But if most of them feel like a

genuine description of who you are, we would love to hear from you.

• Genuine warmth — people feel comfortable around you quickly

• A natural connector — you enjoy introducing people to each other and building

something larger than yourself

• Presence — when you speak people listen. Not because you’re loud but because you’re

real.

• Curiosity — you ask good questions and you actually listen to the answers

• Community pride — you care about the people who have built their lives and businesses

here

• Persistence — you follow up thoughtfully and keep relationships warm

• Integrity — you represent Lani honestly and let her results speak for themselves

• Eager to grow — in whatever direction feels right for you



Compensation

All figures at current exchange rates (~?57 per $1 USD).



Monthly Base salary

Guaranteed

?42,000

~$737



Travel and Starlink

?20,000

~$351



Total Monthly Base

?62,000

~$1088



Setup commissions

10% per client signed



These figures reflect realistic projections based on two group presentations per year across

multiple industries, a growing referral network, and an expanding client base. Your perpetual

residual income grows every year your book grows — and continues for as long as your clients

remain with Lani.



The perpetual residual is tiered to reward loyalty and long-term commitment:

• Clients 1 to 20 — 2% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 21 to 50 — 3% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 51 to 75 — 4% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 76 to 100 — 5% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients above 100 — 6% of monthly retainer per client

Your book belongs to you. The portfolio of clients you build is yours — value you can hold,

transfer, or one day retire on. The legal structure of book ownership is being developed with our

attorneys and will be fully documented before your first client signs.



How to Apply

Send a WhatsApp message or
 introducing yourself. Tell us:

• A little about your background and where you are based

• Why this role connects with you specifically — not just what you’ve done but what draws

you to this particular work in this particular community

• Tell us about a relationship — in your community, your work, or your personal life —

where both trust and genuine connection were part of the story. What made it real? And

how do you see the difference between the two?

We are not looking for a polished cover letter. We are looking for a real person who connects

with what we are building.

Most people can be trusted to some degree. Fewer people generate genuine connection. The

best relationships — and the best work — happen when both are present. Share your story with

us.
