title: Social Media Manager
description:
Social Media Manager

5 Seasons Homestays - Property Management & Co-hosting

Location: Remote (Philippines-based preferred)

Schedule: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

Salary: $600 - $800 USD/month



About Us

We're a growing vacation rental property management company showcasing beautiful short-term rental properties. We need a creative Social Media Manager to build our brand, create engaging content, and drive bookings through social media.



What You'll Do

Create engaging content for Instagram,
, and TikTok

Transform property photos into dynamic videos using AI tools

Design and publish Instagram/Facebook Stories and Reels

Create and manage
 Ads campaigns to drive bookings

Develop and execute social media content calendar

Engage with followers and build online community

Analyze performance metrics and optimize strategy

Write compelling captions and ad copy





Required Skills

? 2+ years social media management experience (hospitality/travel/real estate preferred)

? AI photo-to-video conversion skills (Runway, Pika, D-ID, CapCut, or similar)

?
 Ads experience - proven track record with campaigns and ROI

? Instagram &
 expertise - Stories, Reels, content best practices

? Content creation - graphics, videos, engaging captions

? Excellent written English

? Self-starter - can work independently

? Full-time availability



Nice to Have

? GoHighLevel (GHL) platform experience

? TikTok content creation

? Graphic design (Canva, Adobe)

? Video editing skills

? Vacation rental/Airbnb social media experience



Compensation

$600 - $800/month (based on experience)



Benefits: Paid time off, holiday pay, flexible schedule, performance bonuses



To Apply - Submit ALL of the following:

1. Resume with social media experience and results

2. Portfolio (REQUIRED):

Links to social media accounts you've managed

Examples of AI-generated videos from photos

 Ads examples with performance metrics

Reels/Stories that performed well

Before/After growth metrics



3. Answer These Questions in a Loom video:

Q1: Which AI tools do you use to convert photos into videos? Describe your process.

Q2: Share a
 Ads campaign you ran - objective, creative, and results (CTR, cost per lead, ROAS).

Q3: You're launching a new luxury vacation rental. What's your 30-day social media strategy?

Q4: Have you used Go High Level? If yes, describe experience. If no, how quickly do you learn new platforms?





We need someone who can start ASAP. If you're creative, data-driven, and skilled with AI video tools and
 Ads, apply now!

title: Meta & Google Ads Specialist
description:
About Us:

We are a private acupuncture clinic focused on high-quality, patient-centered care. Our marketing approach is education-driven and designed to attract the right patients—not a high volume of low-quality leads.



We run a small number of focused campaigns and prioritize clarity, strategy, and long-term results over aggressive scaling.



What We’re Looking For:

We are looking for a Meta 
/Instagram) and Google Ads specialist who understands that success is not about generating the most leads, but the right leads.



This role is ideal for someone who prefers working thoughtfully with a smaller budget, refining strategy over time, and focusing on quality rather than volume.



You should be comfortable targeting a specific audience, avoiding low-intent leads, and contributing to overall messaging and strategy—not just managing campaigns.



Responsibilities:

Ad Strategy & Campaign Management

     Plan, launch, and manage Meta and Google Ads campaigns

     Work within a limited budget and scale only when performance justifies it

     Focus on lead quality and actual conversion outcomes, not vanity metrics



Targeting & Positioning

     Build highly specific audiences when appropriate

     Understand when to use broader targeting and guide the algorithm with strong inputs

     Align messaging with a premium, health-conscious audience

     Avoid attracting price-sensitive or low-intent leads



Creative Direction & Collaboration

     Work closely with our social media manager to develop aligned strategies

     Clearly communicate ad concepts, messaging, and angles

     Guide and collaborate on creative development (images, videos, copy)

     Ensure creatives support an education-first marketing approach



Performance Analysis

     Evaluate campaigns based on lead quality and consultation bookings

     Continuously refine targeting, messaging, and creative direction



Communication

     Provide clear, concise updates

     Be responsive and open to feedback

     Collaborate effectively with tea
mbers 



AI-Era Expectations:

     Understand how AI-driven ad systems (such as Meta Advantage+ and Google Performance Max) work

     Focus on improving inputs (creative, messaging, audience signals) rather than relying only on manual controls

     Be comfortable testing different messaging angles and learning from data

     Adapt to platform changes without relying on outdated tactics



What We Do NOT Want:

     Someone focused on generating cheap leads just to improve numbers

     Someone who only executes tasks without strategic thinking

     Someone who avoids involvement in creatives

     Someone who relies on outdated tactics or ignores feedback



Requirements:

     2–5+ years of hands-on experience with Meta Ads and Google Ads

     Experience working with small budgets

     Strong understanding of audience targeting and lead quality

     Ability to guide or contribute to ad creatives

     Strong communication and collaboration skills



We care more about how you think and make decisions than the number of years you’ve worked.



Job Details:



Part-time (ongoing)

Monthly pay: $400–$600 USD (based on experience)

Approximately 15–20 hours per week (flexible based on workload)

Opportunity for a performance-based bonus and compensation increase over time



This role is designed for long-term collaboration. As results improve, there will be opportunities to grow compensation and responsibility.



How to Apply:

     Please include:

          A short introduction (5–6 sentences max)

         1–2 examples of campaigns you managed (include budget, goal, and result)

         Your answer to this question:

         If your campaign is generating many cheap leads but low conversions, what would you do?

         Briefly explain how AI has changed your approach to running ads

          How you define a high-quality lead



Important:

     To confirm that you read this entire job post, please use the following subject line in your application:

     Quality Over Quantity – Ads Specialist

     Applications without this subject line will not be considered.

title: Marketing & Growth Specialist (Capital Raising / Investment Sales Focus)
description:
Part-Time / Full-Time (Fixed Monthly Retainer)

$500 - $1000



Job Overview:

I am looking for a strategic Marketing Specialist to help scale an investment sales operation. We focus on business owners and entrepreneurs who are looking to raise capital (PPMs, private equity, etc.). You will be responsible for completing our customer profiles, refining our website messaging, and executing outreach to high-level decision-makers.



Key Responsibilities:



Customer Persona Development: Finish our "Ideal Investor" and "Capital-Seeking Founder" profiles. You must understand the pain points of high-net-worth individuals.



Website Content & Conversion: Work with me to finalize website copy that builds authority. You should know how to turn a "visitor" into a "qualified lead."



High-Level Outreach: Manage LinkedIn and
 campaigns targeting business owners. No "spammy" tactics—we use high-authority, executive-style communication.



Zoho Integration: (Bonus) Assist in ensuring marketing leads flow correctly into our Zoho CRM/Books ecosystem.



Required Experience:



Proven track record in B2B Marketing or Investor Relations.



Experience writing for a sophisticated audience (Business owners, CEOs, Investors).



Ability to think strategically about a "funnel"—from first touch to a signed PPM.



Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator and CRM workflows.



How to Apply:



Start your message with "STRATEGIC GROWTH."



Provide a brief summary of any experience you have in the finance, investment, or real estate sectors.



Include a link to a writing sample or a website you have worked on.



Confirm your availability for a fixed monthly retainer.

title: Zoho Books Specialist ($100+/mo Fixed Retainer) – Setup & Expense Tracking
description:
am looking for a detail-oriented Zoho Books specialist to manage my business accounting. We have very low transaction volume, so I am looking for a fixed-price partnership rather than hourly billing. My primary goal is 100?curacy in expense tracking and a clean, automated setup.



Scope of Work (Fixed Monthly Deliverables):



Initial Cleanup (Month 1): Review and optimize the Chart of Accounts for investment sales/PPM structure. Sync all bank feeds.



Monthly Categorization: Ensure every single expense is categorized correctly (no "uncategorized" items).



Receipt Management: Monitor the Zoho Receipt inbox to ensure all digital receipts match the bank transactions.



Monthly Reconciliation: Reconcile all bank and credit card statements by the 5th of each month.



Monthly Report: Send a brief P&L summary and a "Missing Receipts" list once a month.



Requirements:



Expertise in Zoho Books is non-negotiable. (Please do not apply if you only know QuickBooks).



Experience setting up Bank Rules and Automated Workflows in Zoho.



Background in Accounting or Bookkeeping (CPA preferred but not required).



High attention to detail—you must be someone who catches the "small things."



How to Apply:



Start your application with the word "ZOHO EXPERT" so I know you read this.



Briefly describe your experience setting up Zoho Books from scratch.



Confirm that you are comfortable with a $100+/month (negotiate) fixed retainer for this low-volume role.

title: Job Title: Investment Sales Specialist – PPM & Financial Products
description:
ob Description

We are seeking a high-energy, experienced Investment Sales Specialist to join our team. This role is specifically for a professional who understands the nuances of Private Placement Memorandums (PPMs) and has a background in high-level financial sales.



If you have experience as a Stock Broker, Investment Consultant, or have successfully raised capital using PPMs, we want to hear from you. You will be responsible for communicating complex financial structures to potential investors and driving growth for our platform.



Key Responsibilities:



Consult with potential investors regarding our PPM offerings.



Manage the end-to-end sales cycle for sophisticated financial products.



Provide clear, compliant, and professional explanations of investment risks and rewards.



Maintain a high level of confidentiality and professionalism.



Requirements:



Proven track record in Financial Sales (Stock Brokerage, Private Equity, or similar).



Deep understanding of PPMs and private offering structures.



Exceptional English communication skills (written and verbal).



Ability to work independently and meet sales targets.



Suggested Settings for your Post:

Type of Employment: Choose Full Time or Part Time based on your current scale.



Wage/Salary: For this level of expertise, you might consider a base salary plus commission. A common starting range for specialized financial VAs is $800 – $1,200/month base, but you can click Suggest a Salary on the page to see current market rates.



Skills Requirement: 1.  Sales Representative

2.  Financial Analysis

3.  Investment Research



Pro-Tip: In the "Skills" search box on your screen, try searching for "Capital Raising" or "Investor Relations" to find candidates who specifically handle these high-value tasks.

title: Website & Marketing Specialist – Private Placement Memorandum (PPM) Expert (AI Savvy)
description:
Overview:

I am looking for a results-driven collaborator to finalize the Marketing and Selling section of my PPM website. This role is crucial for completing the profiling system and scripts used to secure funding. You will be working directly with me to ensure our "person raising money" has a foolproof script to approach and close prospects.



Key Responsibilities:



Website Finalization: Complete the setup for the marketing/selling funnel on our PPM site.



AI Integration: Utilize AI (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) to refine messaging and accelerate content creation.



Scriptwriting: Finalize the "PPM Funding Script" for the fundraiser and the corresponding "Prospect Pitch."



Prospect Profiling: Complete the explanation of the profiling system to help fundraisers identify the best potential investors.



Requirements:



Knowledge of PPM/Finance: Understanding of Private Placement Memorandums and the capital-raising process.



AI Power User: Advanced skills in prompt engineering to generate scripts and marketing copy.



Sales Copywriting: Ability to write persuasive, professional scripts for high-stakes financial conversations.



Technical Setup: Familiarity with website backend marketing sections (landing pages, funnel logic).



Review the website

title: Community Development Representative  El Nido, Palawan
description:
We are hiring Community Development Representatives in five destinations across the

Philippines — Siargao, El Nido, Coron, Bohol and Panglao, and Boracay. This posting is for El

Nido, Palawan.

This is not a typical sales role — and not a tech role either. The ideal person for this position is

part presenter, part community builder, part trusted local presence. You will be the face of this

effort — embedded in the hospitality and tourism community, genuinely invested in the success

of the people you work with, and comfortable introducing her to a community of business

owners who’ve never seen anything like her before.

Lani sells herself. Your job will be to get in front of people — and we will support you in that —

tell the story well, demonstrate something remarkable in real time, and build the kind of

relationships that make people want to say yes — and want to bring their friends along too.



This role comes with two possible growth paths. Some people are natural community builders

who thrive by going deeper in one territory — expanding their client base, strengthening their

community roots, and growing their income steadily over time. Others have leadership

ambitions and want to mentor new ambassadors, oversee multiple territories, and grow into a

regional role. Both paths are equally valued here. You choose the one that fits who you are

today — and that path can evolve as your life and experience develop.



What You Will Do

• Identify and attend local hospitality gatherings, tourism council meetings, DOT events,

restaurant association events, surf operator meetups, and industry get-togethers where

independent business owners congregate

• Deliver a compelling group presentation to rooms of boutique hotel owners, restaurant

operators, surf schools, and activity operators — live, interactive, and anchored in their

specific numbers — including a live demonstration of Lani being activated in real time in

front of the room

• Walk individual prospects through a one-on-one demonstration that shows the specific

revenue their business is currently leaving on the table — Lani does the heavy lifting,

your job is to start the conversation

• Build genuine relationships with independent business owners across the tourism

economy — before, during, and long after they become clients

• Ensure existing clients feel well served and are getting real value — staying present in

the relationship not just at the point of sale

• Introduce clients to the opportunity of joining a growing community of independent

operators — warmly and without pressure — and nurture that community as it develops

• Attend local hospitality and tourism events as a genuine community presence — not as

a vendor but as someone who belongs there

• Have regular conversations with the founder to share what you are learning and to get

support on whatever arises — whether it is a tough situation, an unexpected opportunity,

or simply something worth thinking through together

• Report weekly on conversations, feedback, and market insights

• Follow whichever growth path fits you — deepen your territory over time or grow into a

leadership role as the team expands across the Philippines



What We Are Looking For

Experience and background

We are looking for someone who already belongs to this community — or could walk into it

tomorrow and feel completely at home. The ideal background, in order of priority:

• First priority — hospitality and tourism: experience with boutique hotels, resorts, or

guesthouses as an owner, manager, or guest relations professional. You understand the

world of the independent hotel owner from the inside.



• Second priority — food and beverage: experience with restaurants, cafes, or bars in a

tourism destination. You know the pressures of running a small F&B operation and the

pain of missed reservations and unanswered messages.

• Third priority — surf schools and activity operators: familiarity with the surf and outdoor

activity community. You know the operators, the culture, and the seasonal rhythms.

• Also valued — dive shops and vacation rental operators. Any experience in these

industries is a genuine plus.

• Based in or willing to be deeply and consistently present in your destination

• Comfortable speaking in front of a group — you don’t need to be a professional

presenter but you need to be someone people enjoy listening to

• Existing relationships within the local business community is a significant advantage

• Comfortable with WhatsApp,
, and basic digital tools — you don’t need to be

technical but technology shouldn’t rattle you

• English proficiency — written and spoken



Personal qualities — these matter more than your resume

We don’t expect any candidate to embody all of these perfectly. But if most of them feel like a

genuine description of who you are, we would love to hear from you.

• Genuine warmth — people feel comfortable around you quickly

• A natural connector — you enjoy introducing people to each other and building

something larger than yourself

• Presence — when you speak people listen. Not because you’re loud but because you’re

real.

• Curiosity — you ask good questions and you actually listen to the answers

• Community pride — you care about the people who have built their lives and businesses

here

• Persistence — you follow up thoughtfully and keep relationships warm

• Integrity — you represent Lani honestly and let her results speak for themselves

• Eager to grow — in whatever direction feels right for you



Compensation

All figures at current exchange rates (~?57 per $1 USD).



Monthly Base salary

Guaranteed

?42,000

~$737



Travel and Starlink

?20,000

~$351



Total Monthly Base

?62,000

~$1088



Setup commissions

10% per client signed



These figures reflect realistic projections based on two group presentations per year across

multiple industries, a growing referral network, and an expanding client base. Your perpetual

residual income grows every year your book grows — and continues for as long as your clients

remain with Lani.



The perpetual residual is tiered to reward loyalty and long-term commitment:

• Clients 1 to 20 — 2% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 21 to 50 — 3% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 51 to 75 — 4% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 76 to 100 — 5% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients above 100 — 6% of monthly retainer per client

Your book belongs to you. The portfolio of clients you build is yours — value you can hold,

transfer, or one day retire on. The legal structure of book ownership is being developed with our

attorneys and will be fully documented before your first client signs.



How to Apply

Send a WhatsApp message or
 introducing yourself. Tell us:

• A little about your background and where you are based

• Why this role connects with you specifically — not just what you’ve done but what draws

you to this particular work in this particular community

• Tell us about a relationship — in your community, your work, or your personal life —

where both trust and genuine connection were part of the story. What made it real? And

how do you see the difference between the two?

We are not looking for a polished cover letter. We are looking for a real person who connects

with what we are building.

Most people can be trusted to some degree. Fewer people generate genuine connection. The

best relationships — and the best work — happen when both are present. Share your story with

us.

title: YouTube Script Writer (Warhammer)
description:
We are looking for a Script Writer to create long-form Warhammer 40K lore videos.

Channel:





RESPONSIBILITIES

• Write Warhammer 40K scripts (4,000–10,000 words)

• Research lore topics and verify accuracy

• Structure engaging narrative storytelling

• Deliver scripts on schedule



REQUIREMENTS

• Strong English writing ability

• Good research skills

• Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT / Claude)

• Interest in storytelling



TO APPLY

Send writing samples or relevant work.

title: Home Care Scheduler
description:
(IF YOU DO NOT HAVE PREVIOUS HOME CARE SCHEDULING EXPERIENCE OR DO NOT KNOW HOW TO USE WELLSKY, PLEASE DO NOT APPLY).



Position: Scheduling Manager



Schedule: 

- Full-time: MON-SUN

- Must be able to work 5am-6pm MT (Arizona State time) and On Call outside of these times.



Details:

We are seeking a dependable, hands-on Scheduling Manager to lead and support the scheduling operations of our fast-paced home care agency. This is a remote role, but candidates must be available during Arizona State time and has prior home care scheduling experience. The Scheduling Manager will oversee the scheduling team, provide backup coverage when needed, assist in training new schedulers, and address performance concerns with professionalism. This role is key to ensuring that all shifts are covered accurately and efficiently, and that both caregivers and clients receive timely and effective scheduling support.



Key Responsibilities:

- Supervise the daily performance and output of the scheduling team

- Be available for on-call emergencies or urgent support needs during scheduled hours

- Step in to assist with scheduling tasks when gaps or high-volume situations arise

- Ensure all shifts are filled appropriately based on caregiver availability, skill set, and client needs

- Train and mentor new or junior scheduling tea
mbers

- Conduct performance conversations with schedulers when issues arise, offering support and corrective guidance as needed

- Maintain high standards of communication and follow-through with caregivers, clients, and internal departments

- Use scheduling software efficiently to manage, update, and adjust schedules

- Monitor fill rates, track coverage metrics, and proactively prevent gaps in service



Requirements:

- Minimum 1–2 years of experience in home care or healthcare scheduling

- Prior experience using scheduling platforms such as WellSky. (IF YOU DO NOT KNOW HOW TO USE WELLSKY, DO NOT APPLY).

- Strong understanding of caregiver-client matching based on compatibility, skill set, and availability

- Comfortable having difficult conversations and providing feedback to tea
mbers

- Excellent communication skills across phone, text, and

- Calm under pressure with the ability to resolve scheduling conflicts quickly and professionally

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and tech-savvy

- Collaborative, team-first mentality with strong leadership skills



To Apply please complete this survey:

title: Real Estate Lead Manager (Cold Calling/Lead Qualification/Appointment Setting)
description:
Job Title: Real Estate Lead Manager



Job Type: Full-Time



Join Our Dynamic Team!



Commit to a company that’s as committed to you! We want to keep you for years, not weeks!

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Self-motivated with a strong desire to succeed.

Perseverance and tenacity.

Applicants must be available Monday-Friday from 8:30 AM - 4:30 PM EST



How to Apply:



If you’re ready to make an impact in the real estate industry, we want to hear from you! Please submit your resume along with a short 
 recording introducing yourself and sharing why you’re the perfect fit for this role. As well as a Microsoft Teams
. Please also mention times and days of the week you're available to work in EST. Applicants must also have a PayPal account, and list their prior real estate experience.



Join us and be a part of something extraordinary! Your journey to success starts here.

title: Compliance Researcher Virtual Assistant (Part-time / Full-time Remote)
description:
About the Company



We are an early-stage SaaS startup building ComplianceOS — an intelligent compliance operating system for U.S. construction contractors and trades businesses. Our platform helps contractors track licenses, permits, insurance, and certifications so they avoid costly fines, project shutdowns, and lost bids.



We are currently in the MVP stage and need help building the core requirements database that powers our gap analysis engine.



Note: create a video to have an intro about yourself, your outstanding works in the past (with quantitative data) and why you are the best fit for this position?



# Job Summary

We are looking for a smart, organized, and detail-oriented Compliance Researcher VA to help map licensing, permit, and compliance requirements for California general contractors and trades (with plans to expand later).



You will use official government websites, PDFs, and AI tools to research and structure data into clean checklists. Strong attention to detail and comfort with AI tools are more important than deep prior experience.



# Key Responsibilities



- Research and document licensing/permit requirements for California Contractors State License Board (CSLB) classifications, county business licenses, workers’ compensation, general liability insurance, bonds, and related items.

- Build and maintain structured spreadsheets or database matrices (e.g., “For a General Contractor in Los Angeles doing residential remodeling ? list of 10–15 required items with expiry rules, links, and notes”).

- Review official sources (CSLB guides, county portals, state websites) and summarize rules clearly.

- Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.) to extract information from long PDFs and draft initial checklists — then verify accuracy against original sources.

- Flag ambiguous or conflicting information and escalate to the founder for review.

- Keep the requirements database up-to-date as rules change (monitor key portals monthly).

- Organize research findings in Notion, Airtable, or Google Sheets for easy use by the development team.



Requirements / What We’re Looking For



- Some experience in legal research, paralegal work, administrative compliance, or regulatory document review (even 6–12 months is helpful).

- Excellent English reading and writing skills — you must be able to summarize complex rules into simple, clear language.

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills (this role involves a lot of data accuracy).

- Comfortable using AI tools daily to speed up research (we will share effective prompts).

- Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision.

- Basic familiarity with U.S. government websites or licensing boards is a big plus (but not required — we will train you).

- Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace.



Nice-to-have (not required):

- Previous experience as a legal VA, paralegal assistant, or compliance support role.

- Experience working with construction, contractor licensing, or regulated industries.



# What We Offer



- Monthly compensation: $600–$800 (depending on experience and output quality).

- Flexible remote work (Philippines or similar time zones preferred for overlap with U.S. founder).

- Opportunity to grow with a fast-moving startup (potential for more hours and higher pay as the company scales).

- Clear weekly goals, templates, and direct guidance from the founder.

- Performance bonuses for high-quality, timely deliverables.



# How to Apply

Please reply with:

- Your resume or short bio highlighting any legal/research/compliance experience.

- Why you think you’d be a good fit for this role (2–3 sentences).

- A sample of any research or summarization work you’ve done (even a short example is fine).

title: Social Media & Community Manager (LinkedIn + Canva)
description:
Social Media & Community Manager

Female Lawyers' Club

Please note: applications must be submitted via the onlinejobs.ph messaging system only. Applications sent by
 will not be considered.

________________________________________

About Female Lawyers' Club

Female Lawyers' Club is a professional membership community for senior female lawyers in the UK and beyond. Through membership, online events and courses, we support women in the legal profession to build sustainable, well-paid and fulfilling careers.

Our members are experienced, senior professionals - partners, consultant solicitors, barristers and in-house counsel. The tone of everything we do reflects that: warm and human, but always professional.

The Founder, Rachel Spink, is a practising employment lawyer who runs Female Lawyers' Club alongside her legal work. This role is a key hire that will allow Rachel to focus on strategy, content and growing the business.

________________________________________

About the role

This is a part-time remote role starting at 5 hours per week, with the expectation that hours will grow as the business grows.

The main purpose of the role is to manage and grow Female Lawyers' Club's social media presence and 
munity, and to keep track of what is working so we can improve over time.

This is not a role for someone who simply wants to schedule posts. We are looking for someone who takes genuine ownership, thinks strategically about engagement, and understands how to communicate with a senior professional audience.

________________________________________

Responsibilities

Community engagement

• Managing and growing our LinkedIn group (hundreds of senior lawyers)

• Posting discussion prompts and conversation starters

• Welcoming new members and making them feel included

• Responding to comments professionally and warmly

• Supporting engagement in our members' WhatsApp group

• Sharing relevant articles and discussion topics

Social media content

• Turning blog posts and newsletters into LinkedIn and Instagram posts

• Creating LinkedIn carousels and graphics using Canva

• Scheduling 3–5 posts per week across platforms

• Repurposing existing content into new formats

• Suggesting new content ideas based on what is resonating with our audience

Performance tracking

• Keeping an ongoing record of key metrics: likes, comments, shares and engagement rates

• Tracking what types of content perform best and flagging patterns

• Making suggestions over time for how to improve performance based on the data

Design and content creation

• Creating social media graphics and carousel posts in Canva

• Maintaining consistency with the Female Lawyers' Club brand

• Occasionally creating simple PDFs, workbooks or event marketing materials

Website support (occasional)

• Uploading blog posts and updating website copy (Squarespace experience helpful but not essential)

________________________________________

What we are looking for

Essential:

• Excellent written English - this is the single most important requirement

• A professional, warm tone that is appropriate for senior lawyers

• Experience with LinkedIn, including LinkedIn groups

• Strong Canva skills with an eye for clean, professional design

• Ability to work independently and manage your own time without constant direction

• Reliable and responsive - you will be expected to communicate promptly

• Genuine interest in the mission of Female Lawyers' Club

Also valuable:

• Experience managing online communities

• Understanding of social media analytics and performance tracking

• Experience with Instagram

• Squarespace experience

________________________________________

Important note on tone

Our audience is made up of senior female lawyers - partners, barristers and experienced solicitors. The way we communicate with them must always be professional, warm and intelligent. It must never be overly casual, excitable or generic.

If you are used to writing for lifestyle, influencer or general consumer audiences, please consider carefully whether this role is the right fit. We are not looking for that style of content.

________________________________________

What it is like working with Rachel

• Rachel is kind, honest and wants you to succeed

• She is very busy, so she needs someone who can take real ownership of this role without needing constant direction

• She values reliability and clear communication above almost everything else

• Hours and pay can increase as the business grows

________________________________________

Hours and pay

• 5 hours per week to start

• Hours will increase as the business grows

• Rate is negotiable depending on experience

• Rachel is based in the UK so some overlap in working hours is needed

________________________________________

How to apply

Please apply via the onlinejobs.ph messaging system only. Do not send applications by
.

To be considered, please include all of the following in your message:

1. A brief introduction explaining why you are interested in this role and why you would be a good fit. Please keep this to a maximum of 150 words.

2. Answer this question: Below is a comment posted by a member inside a professional community for senior female lawyers. Please write a reply to this comment as if you were managing the community on behalf of the Founder.

"I've just made partner after twelve years. I honestly didn't think it would happen. I'm not sure whether to feel proud or just exhausted."

Your reply should be warm, genuine and professional. It should feel like it comes from a real person, not a corporate account. Maximum 5 sentences.

3. Share 2–3 examples of Canva graphics or social media posts you have created. A portfolio link is fine.

4. Please attach your CV or resume.

Please include the phrase "FLC April 2026" at the start of your message so that we know you have read the full description.

________________________________________

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.

title: Software Implementation Specialist
description:
# Software Implementation Specialist



**Location:** Remote (Philippines)

**Schedule:** US business hours, Eastern Time preferred

**Type:** Full-time



---



## About Company



We are a wealth management data infrastructure company. We help RIAs, broker-dealers, family offices, and TAMPs turn fragmented data into something they can actually use. We're a small, fast-moving team where your work is visible and your contributions matter.



---



## The Role



You'll be the bridge between our customers and our platform—the person who takes what a client needs and turns it into a working configuration.



This isn't a back-office role. You'll be on customer calls throughout the day, then in the platform making things happen. A typical day might start with a kickoff call for a new client, shift into configuring their data integrations, and end with troubleshooting an issue for an existing customer.



If you've worked at a development agency, digital consultancy, or software company where you balanced technical work with client interaction, you'll recognize the rhythm.



---



## What You'll Do



- Execute configuration work based on project plans and customer requests

- Join implementation calls, kickoffs, and status meetings

- Write SQL to query and validate data

- Modify HTML templates and work with JSON for integrations

- Document configurations and maintain project records

- Escalate to product and engineering when custom solutions are needed



---



## What We're Looking For



**Technical**

- Working knowledge of SQL—you can write queries, not just run them

- Comfortable reading and modifying HTML

- Experience with JSON in APIs, data structures, or config files



**Experience**

- 2+ years in a client-facing technical role at an agency, consultancy, or software company

- Track record of juggling multiple projects or clients at once

- Strong written and verbal English; comfortable on video calls with US clients



**Setup**

- Available during US Eastern business hours (roughly 8am–5pm ET)

- Reliable internet and a quiet space for calls

- Self-directed—you see a problem, you figure it out



Bonus: financial services, data integration, or SaaS implementation experience. None of it is required. Learning speed and clear communication matter more.



---



## Why 



You'll work directly with leadership and have real influence on how we serve customers. We're building something meaningful in an industry that's overdue for better technology, and we offer competitive compensation and a collaborative remote environment to match.



---



## How to Apply



Send your resume with a few sentences about a time you had to balance technical work with customer communication. We read every application and respond to everyone.

Client images, logos and brand colours will be provided. All copywriting is handled by us so you only need to focus on the visual side.

* Delivering completed sites within 24-48 hours - this is a simple task and fast turnaround is a MUST



What we're looking for:



* Solid WordPress and Elementor experience - non negotiable

* A genuine eye for design - the finished product needs to look great every time

* Fast and reliable - we expect every project delivered within 24-48 hours without chasing

* Good communication - if something isn't clear ask rather than guess

This is an ongoing role and we expect volume to grow significantly over the coming months. The right person will have consistent work long term and the chance to grow into a supervisor role down the line.

title: Recruiter/Talent Sourcer (2026)
description:
Schedule: Ability to work EST or PST hours.



About Us:

We are a pioneering startup dedicated to transforming the landscape of autism diagnosis through remote evaluations. Our mission is to provide accessible, comprehensive, and accurate autism diagnostic services to individuals and families, regardless of their location. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our innovative team.



Position Overview:

We’re seeking a mission-aligned Recruiter/Talent Sourcer to drive our hiring efforts and attract top-tier clinical and administrative talent. You’ll be the bridge between our team leads and high-potential candidates, helping ensure that every new hire reflects our values of empathy, innovation, and quality care. You will manage the full recruitment lifecycle—from sourcing and screening to interviews and offer negotiation—with a strong emphasis on behavioral health, telehealth, and operational roles.



The Process:

As part of our interview process, you will be asked to give a short presentation, so please apply only if you are comfortable doing this. Since we receive a large number of applications, we’d also like you to include three things in your message:



1. Why this role seems like a good fit for you.

2. A brief overview of your background.

3. The result of subtracting 5 from 17.



Key Responsibilities:

-Lead the recruiting process for non clinical roles

-Assist the recruiting process for clinical roles (e.g., psychologists, speech therapists, care coordinators)

-Collaborate with hiring managers to refine job descriptions and define ideal candidate profiles.

-Source talent via job boards, social platforms, college networks, community outreach and phone communications

-Screen resumes, conduct interviews, and assess cultural fit and qualifications.

-Present qualified candidates to hiring managers in a timely, organized manner.

-Ensure consistent communication with candidates to create a thoughtful, professional experience.

-Maintain accurate applicant tracking data.

-Assist with onboarding and new hire transitions.

-Participate in the development of recruiting strategies and best practices in a startup environment.



Qualifications

-Prior experience in healthcare or clinical recruitment (preferred)

-Strong sourcing skills and familiarity with healthcare licensure types (e.g., psychologists, BCBAs, SLPs, LCSWs)

-Excellent communication and organizational skills

-Resourceful and able to manage multiple openings independently

-Comfortable using ATS systems and recruitment platforms

-Private, professional home office setup

-Experience in a startup or fast-paced environment is a plus



What We Offer

-Competitive compensation

-Flexible remote working opportunities

-A supportive and innovative work environment and the opportunity to make an impact in the field of autism diagnosis

title: Care Concierge (2026)
description:
Join Our Innovative and Impactful Team as a Remote Care Concierge!

We invite you to join us in making a difference in the lives of families and individuals seeking autism diagnosis, with the flexibility and autonomy provided by contracted remote work. At Autism Diagnosis Group, we are at the forefront of transforming autism diagnosis and support.



Company: Autism Diagnosis Group

Location: Remote



About Us:

Autism Diagnosis Group is a pioneering startup dedicated to transforming the landscape of autism diagnosis through remote evaluations. Our mission is to provide accessible, comprehensive, and accurate autism diagnostic services to individuals and families, regardless of their location. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our innovative team.



Position Overview:

We are seeking a dedicated Care Concierge to be the primary point of contact for our clients. The Care Concierge will help families and individuals schedule autism diagnostic evaluations, support them in assembling pre-visit assessments, guide them through the diagnostic process, and provide additional support after a diagnosis, while representing our company with professionalism and empathy.

title: Executive Operations Manager for Founder-Led Beauty, Fashion & Lifestyle Brand
description:
Job Type



Part-Time, Remote



Hours



Approximately 2.5 to 4 hours per day, Monday through Friday



Compensation



Based on experience



About the Brand



Tiff Benson is a founder-led beauty, fragrance, fashion, and lifestyle brand with a strong editorial point of view and a growing digital presence across content, publishing, partnerships, and brand-building platforms. The business is entering a stage where stronger operational support is needed to maintain excellence, improve workflow, and support continued growth.



We are seeking an experienced Executive Operations Manager to help build and maintain the systems, processes, and operational structure that support a high-level founder and brand ecosystem.



About the Role



This role is for someone with proven experience supporting founder-level, executive-level, or C-suite talent, and who understands how to create structure behind a fast-moving brand and business.



The Executive Operations Manager will serve as a key operational partner, helping translate vision into process, building clear SOPs and workflows, managing priorities, and overseeing task flow across multiple areas of the business. This person should be highly organized, exceptionally detail-oriented, and comfortable supporting a founder-facing environment where polish, discretion, and follow-through matter.



The ideal candidate has real experience not only assisting at a high level, but also managing others, quality-checking work, creating systems, and ensuring work moves through the business efficiently and correctly.



Key Responsibilities

 • Build, document, and maintain SOPs for recurring tasks, workflows, and internal processes

 • Create structure around day-to-day business operations so work is organized, clear, and easy to execute

 • Translate verbal direction, voice notes, Loom recordings, and founder guidance into actionable workflows and next steps

 • Oversee task flow across tea
mbers and ensure assignments are completed accurately and on time

 • Review, quality-check, and organize work before it is escalated for founder review

 • Help manage internal operations across content support, publishing support, partnerships support, and administrative workflow

 • Maintain project boards, trackers, task lists, and weekly priority overviews

 • Improve handoff systems so work is delivered cleanly from one stage to the next

 • Identify inefficiencies and proactively recommend stronger operational solutions

 • Ensure timelines, deadlines, and follow-ups are properly managed

 • Support a high standard of professionalism, organization, and consistency across the business

 • Help create an operational environment that allows the founder to stay focused on high-level creative, strategic, and brand-facing work



What We’re Looking For



The right person for this role is not simply task-oriented. They are operationally minded.



They know how to:

 • create structure

 • think ahead

 • manage moving parts

 • improve process

 • organize people and priorities

 • uphold standards

 • reduce friction

 • support executive-level workflow with maturity and discretion



This person should be comfortable acting as a strong second-in-command on the operational side of the business.



Required Experience

 • Proven experience supporting a founder, entrepreneur, executive, or C-suite professional

 • Proven experience creating SOPs, workflow systems, documentation, and internal process structure

 • Proven experience managing tasks across multiple functions or tea
mbers

 • Experience reviewing work for quality, accuracy, and completeness before final review

 • Strong background in operations, executive assistance, project coordination, team coordination, or workflow management

 • Excellent written and verbal communication skills

 • Strong judgment, professionalism, and discretion

 • Ability to work independently and maintain a high level of follow-through



Preferred Experience

 • Experience supporting a creator, personal brand, media brand, beauty brand, fashion brand, or founder-led business

 • Experience working with remote teams or distributed contractors

 • Familiarity with publishing workflows, content operations, or brand partnerships support

 • Experience helping build internal structure during a growth phase



Tools and Platforms



Helpful experience includes:

 • Google Drive

 • Gmail

 • Notion

 • Trello

 • ClickUp

 • Asana

 • Loom

 • Canva



Experience with Instagram, Substack, and founder-led digital business workflows is a plus.



What Success Looks Like in This Role

 • Internal systems are clearly documented and easy to follow

 • Tasks move through the business with less friction and stronger accountability

 • Tea
mbers have greater clarity around responsibilities and handoffs

 • Work is reviewed and cleaned up before it reaches the founder

 • Operational standards remain high as the business grows

 • The founder is able to stay focused on creative direction, strategy, and high-value decision-making



Ideal Candidate Profile



You are:

 • highly detail-oriented

 • process-driven

 • calm under pressure

 • proactive

 • organized

 • dependable

 • professional

 • experienced in executive-level support

 • confident managing workflow behind the scenes



You understand how to support a high-performing founder without creating unnecessary noise. You are thoughtful, resourceful, and know how to keep operations moving at a high standard.



To Apply



Please send:

 1. A short introduction about your background

 2. Details on your experience supporting founder-level, executive-level, or C-suite talent

 3. Examples of SOPs, workflows, or systems you have created

 4. Any experience managing others, reviewing work, or overseeing team task flow

 5. A list of tools and platforms you are comfortable using

 6. Why you believe you would be a strong fit for this role

title: AI Automation & CRM Specialist (Zapier + HubSpot + GPT) – Build a Sales System
description:
AI Automation & CRM Specialist (Zapier + HubSpot + GPT) – Build a Sales System for Commercial Furniture Agency Business



There are two arms to our business

1. We are a commercial furniture Agency representing international hospitality brands. Paid commission on sales.

2. We also offer Interior Design, manufacture, supply and procurement of furniture, FF&E and related products, targeting hotels, resorts, and interior designers etc across Australia and Fiji.



We are building an AI-powered sales and lead generation system to automate how we obtain leads and manage enquiries, generate quotes, coordinate with suppliers, and follow up to close deals.



We are looking for a highly capable automation specialist to build this system using Zapier (or Make), HubSpot, and OpenAI (GPT).



This is NOT a basic VA role.

We are looking for someone who can think, structure workflows, and build systems — not just follow instructions.



What You’ll Be Building (Initial Scope):



You will implement a 4-week system rollout:



1. CRM Setup (HubSpot)



* Build deal pipeline and stages

* Create custom fields (project type, products, quantities, timeline, etc.)

* Connect Outlook
 integration

* Create dashboard for pipeline visibility

* Organise and clean up data base of existing clients



2. Lead Generation Automation

 ? AI parsing ? structured data ? HubSpot deal

* Use OpenAI to extract key information from incoming enquiries



3. Lead Intake Automation

* Build workflow:

 
 ? AI parsing ? structured data ? HubSpot deal

* Use OpenAI to extract key information from incoming enquiries



4. Supplier & Proposal Automation



* Generate structured supplier briefs automatically

* Process supplier quotes (Excel/PDF)

* Generate draft client proposal
s



5. Follow-Up System



* Build automated follow-up sequences

* Create task reminders and deal tracking

* Ensure no leads are missed





What Success Looks Like:



* We create an automated and segmented system for cold calling and warm leads 

* Every enquiry is captured and tracked in HubSpot

*
s are turned into structured deal data automatically

* Quotes move quickly through the system

* Follow-ups are consistent and automated

* The business owner only steps in to close deals





**Ongoing Opportunity:**

After the system is built, we are looking for someone to:



* Maintain and improve automations

* Monitor workflows

* Assist with CRM and sales operations

* Potential long-term role (10–20 hours/week)



**Required Skills:**



* Strong experience with Zapier or 
 (must have built multi-step workflows)

* Experience setting up and automating HubSpot CRM

* Experience using OpenAI / ChatGPT for automation

* Strong English communication (written and verbal)

* Ability to think logically and structure systems



Bonus (Highly Valued):



* Experience with sales pipelines or CRM-driven businesses

* Experience with product, procurement, or quoting workflows

* Experience handling
 parsing or document automation



**Important:**

We are not looking for someone to just “do tasks”.



You must be able to:



* Understand business workflows

* Suggest improvements

* Build clean, scalable systems





To Apply:

Please include ALL of the following:



1. A short description of a similar automation you have built (Zapier/Make)

2. Your experience with HubSpot (what have you set up?)

3. A Loom video (2–5 minutes) walking through a workflow you’ve built (preferred)

4. Your hourly rate and availability



Applications without examples will not be considered.

Build a simple workflow:

 ? AI extraction ? structured output (Google Sheet or similar)





Timing:



* Initial build: 20–40 hours over 2–3 weeks



If you are someone who enjoys building systems that make businesses run better — we’d love to work with you.

title: Cold Calling Closer for B2B Solar Lead Generation (Commission-Based, Remote))
description:
SolarBridge is a fast-growing B2B lead generation company helping solar installation companies across the United States get exclusive, qualified homeowner leads. We're looking for a hungry, confident cold caller who can CLOSE DEALS on the phone — not just book appointments.



?????????????????????????????????????????



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Make 100+ outbound calls per day to solar installation company owners, VPs of Sales, and decision-makers across the US

- Qualify prospects using our proven script (Are they buying leads? What's their volume? Who's the decision-maker?)

- PITCH and CLOSE them on the phone (we provide the script, you execute)

- Book qualified prospects for a 5-minute "contract review call" with our founder (for hot leads you've already closed)

- Track all calls and outcomes in our CRM (simple Google Sheets — we'll train you)

- Provide daily activity reports: calls made, conversations had, deals closed



This is NOT just an appointment-setting role. You will be expected to handle objections, pitch the value, and ask for the sale on every call.



????????????????????????????????????????



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



REQUIRED:

? Excellent English (US accent strongly preferred) — you'll be calling American business owners, so clear, confident, professional communication is ESSENTIAL

? B2B phone sales experience (cold calling, inside sales, or closing experience required — we need a closer, not a beginner)

? Comfortable making 100+ calls per day and hearing "no" without getting discouraged

? Self-motivated and results-driven — you'll work independently with daily check-ins

? Reliable internet (minimum 10 Mbps), quiet workspace, quality headset/microphone

? Available 20 hours/week (4 hours/day, Monday-Friday) during US business hours (9am-5pm EST)



PREFERRED (but not required):

? Experience selling to contractors, home services businesses, or B2B SaaS

? Familiarity with CRM tools (Google Sheets, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

? Track record of hitting sales quotas in previous roles



????????????????????????????????????????



COMPENSATION (PERFORMANCE-BASED)



TRIAL PERIOD (First 14 Days):

- $200 USD paid at end of trial (ONLY if you close 8+ demos/deals)

- $25 USD bonus per additional deal closed beyond 8

- Example: Close 10 deals in trial = $200 base + $50 bonus = $250 total

- If you close fewer than 8 deals, trial ends with no payment (this is a results-only role)



ONGOING EMPLOYMENT (After Passing Trial):

- $350 USD/month base salary

- $25 USD per deal closed (no cap — top performers earn $600-$800/month)

title: SDR / Recruiter
description:
Sales Development Representative (SDR) — Remote | TALENTD Recruitment

Employment Type: Full-time



About TALENTD

TALENTD is a Sydney-based specialist recruitment agency focused exclusively on digital marketing, eCommerce, and performance marketing talent across Australia. We work with some of the country's most exciting consumer brands — from fast-growing DTC startups to established retail names — and we're known for doing recruitment properly: no spray and pray, just genuine expertise and long-term relationships.



As we grow, we're looking for a driven SDR to join the team remotely and help us open doors with new clients across Australia and USA .



The Role

This is a business development-focused role sitting at the front end of our sales process. You'll be responsible for identifying and engaging prospective clients — primarily eCommerce, fashion, FMCG, and retail brands — and generating qualified conversations for our senior consultants to close.

title: Paid Media Analyst
description:
WHO WE ARE



Kimura Worldwide is a digital advertising agency specializing in paid media for e-commerce, home services, and coaching businesses. Our mission is to run paid media that wins, using tested strategies built from years of experience and measured by results, not activity.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



We're looking for a full-time Paid Media Analyst to support campaign execution and reporting across Google and Meta. Your job is to keep accounts healthy, data clean, and clients informed.



We currently manage paid media across a growing roster of clients. We are a lean team handling campaign builds, optimizations, and reporting while balancing client communication and strategy work. We need you to come in and own the execution layer so the senior team can stay focused on strategy.



You'll report directly to Jeff (that's me), and escalate anything outside your scope as needed. We work async-first with a weekly Google Meets sync. Philippine business hours are fine, though we will align on a standing meeting time that works for both sides.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Your job will be to use your past experience to:



- Monitor and manage campaigns across Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager on a daily basis

- Pull performance reports and flag anomalies, pacing issues, or anything that needs attention

- Execute campaign optimizations ( bid adjustments, budget pacing, audience updates, and ad copy rotations)

- Support campaign builds according to established SOPs

- Maintain accurate campaign data and naming structure across all active accounts

- Update and maintain client reporting dashboards in Looker Studio

- Communicate campaign status and updates clearly in writing, without needing to be prompted

- Log tasks and update project status in Asana

- Refine or document processes in Notion as needed

- Escalate anything outside your scope to the senior strategist promptly and with context

- Support the team with other campaign-related tasks as needed



EXPERIENCE



We care more about skill level than years on a resume, but we expect at least 2 years of hands-on experience running paid media campaigns across Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager.



You're comfortable communicating directly with senior leadership, flagging performance issues before they're asked about, and pushing back if something doesn't look right. We want someone who has opinions and isn't afraid to share them.



You know your way around campaign builds, bid management, and performance reporting without needing your hand held. You're diligent, organized, and default to over-communicating rather than going quiet.

You're also comfortable working inside tools like Asana, Notion, Google Drive, Google Meets and Slack as part of your daily workflow.



HOW WE WILL HELP YOU SUCCEED



We want you to succeed here. We will get you fully up to speed on our systems, clients, and processes so you can hit the ground running. 



We're not here to teach you paid media, your experience covers that. What we will do is give you the context you need to apply your skills in the right direction.



We will also invest in your growth. That means access to training resources, honest feedback, and a team that actually listens. We're humans first, colleagues second.



EMPLOYMENT TYPE



This is a full-time role. We're not looking for an agency.



Please begin your cover letter with the name of one of the case studies featured in our online portfolio at 
/our-work .



APPLY HERE: 
/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc6oOAKQ44xxMvdvXKxijIqA-LPRwypVAgq_GOimP0Vb7Xr2Q/viewform

REQUIREMENTS

• Bonus if you’ve worked on games with high CCU or visits



WHY WORK WITH US

If you’ve got the skills and want to be part of a team that moves fast and builds games that players actually care about, apply now.

nt and post these clips on across all social media platforms

1. I will review applications.

nt. We’re offering a flexible, part-time or project-based opportunity where your ideas are valued, your skills are trusted, and your schedule is respected.



We’re not just looking for someone to “keep the lights on.” We want a partner to help us unlock the full potential of Zoho, streamline our sales and marketing workflows, and ensure that we’re always one step ahead in how we engage with our customers.



What You'll Do



>>> Customize & optimize Zoho CRM to support our evolving business needs

>>> Design and manage
 campaigns using Zoho Campaigns that actually get results

>>> Analyze CRM data to help us better understand our customers and their journeys

>>> Train and support our internal team so everyone can thrive using Zoho tools

>>> Troubleshoot, configure, build, and refine—you're the go-to Zoho expert

>>> Recommend smarter ways to use dashboards, workflows, integrations, SMS/email campaigns and more



What We're Looking For



- Hands-on experience with Zoho CRM and Zoho Campaigns (customization is your jam)

- Strategic thinker who loves turning messy processes into clean, scalable systems

- Comfortable working independently and communicating clearly in a remote environment

- Familiarity with tools like Asana (or other project management software)

- Someone who genuinely enjoys sharing knowledge and helping others get the most out of their tools



Perks & Benefits



- Flexible hours — work when you’re most productive

- Remote-first culture — work from anywhere

- Competitive pay (part
 basis)

- Potential for long-term collaboration and future projects

- A small, nimble, and supportive team that values your input



How to Apply:



We want to get to know you more, please send us:



- Your updated resume

- 1-minute introduction video that tells us:

- Your experience with Zoho CRM and Zoho Campaigns, especially around buildouts

- Your availability (we’re looking for someone to contribute 5–10 hours/month)



Whether you feel confident reviewing our existing Zoho setup and offering expert guidance on ways to improve (e.g., dashboards, automations, integrations, campaigns, etc.)



Let’s build something great together. If you're excited to leave a real impact and love making systems sing, we can’t wait to meet you.

title: LEGAL VIRTUAL ASSISTANT — JACKSON LAW FIRM, P.C.
description:
About Us

Jackson Law Firm, P.C. is a personal injury and workers' compensation law firm based in St. Louis, Missouri. We represent injured clients throughout the St. Louis area in automobile a
 cases, premises liability, workers' compensation, and related matters. We are growing and looking for a sharp, organized, and highly motivated Legal Virtual Assistant to join our team and deliver excellent service alongside our attorney.



What You Will Do

Answer all incoming calls via RingCentral; collect client information and connect calls to the attorney

Manage the attorney's Google Calendar — schedule consultations, client calls, court appearances, and depositions (no same-day scheduling without explicit attorney approval)

Triage and manage the firm's Gmail inbox; draft routine correspondence for attorney review and approval before sending

Order and track medical records using YoCierge, the firm's primary records retrieval platform; obtain attorney approval before submitting any order

Prepare medical authorization bundles for client signature using YoCierge's YoSign electronic authorization system, with paper backup authorizations available when needed

Organize and maintain all client files in CasePeer case management software using the firm's file naming conventions

Assist in migrating existing client files from Google Drive into CasePeer

Open insurance claims and send Letters of Representation (LORs) to adjusters for attorney review

Assist with bill verification and demand letter preparation

Submit a daily End of Day Report covering completed tasks, problems encountered, and incomplete items



Requirements

4-year university degree or international equivalent — required

Exceptional spoken and written English — clear, professional phone presence is non-negotiable

Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple matters simultaneously

Proficiency in Google Suite — Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Drive, Google Docs

Ability to learn new software quickly — CasePeer and YoCierge training provided

High attention to detail — especially in document naming, file organization, and correspondence

Self-starter who follows through without constant supervision

Reliable high-speed internet connection and quiet, professional home office environment

Prior legal or medical administrative experience is a strong plus but not required







Compensation & Terms

Item

Details

Salary

$1,700/month

Schedule

Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST

Annual Bonus

Eligible for annual performance bonus at attorney's discretion based on firm performance

Probationary Period

90 days with benchmark reviews at Day 30, 60, and 90

Vacation

15 working days per year

Sick Leave

Per applicable firm policy

Payment Method

Monthly via Wise (international bank transfer)



How to Apply

Send the following to 
 with subject line: Legal VA Application — [Your Name]



IMPORTANT — Read This Before Applying

To demonstrate your attention to detail, your application
 must begin with the following phrase:



     "Jackson Law Firm runs on excellence."



Applications that do not open with this exact phrase will not be reviewed.



Your resume or CV

A brief cover letter (3–5 sentences) explaining why you are a strong fit for this role

A 1-minute video introduction — upload to YouTube (unlisted) and include the link. Tell us who you are and why you want this role.

Answer these two questions in your
: (1) Describe a time you managed multiple urgent tasks at once — what did you do? (2) What experience do you have with legal or medical terminology?



We are reviewing applications on a rolling basis and looking to hire immediately. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Google Ads Manager – Call-Driven Local Clinic
description:
We run a local clinic where every conversion starts with a phone call.

We're not looking for someone to manage campaigns. We're looking for someone who thinks in calls — who understands that in our market, the quality of who calls matters more than how many people call.

If you've only optimized for volume, this probably isn't the right fit.

What you'll be doing



Manage and optimize Google Ads Search campaigns

Identify and eliminate wasted spend from search terms

Improve call quality — not just call volume

Review and improve call tracking and attribution

Align ads and landing pages with real caller intent

Diagnose whether problems come from traffic quality, tracking gaps, landing pages, or call handling



What matters to us



Fewer junk calls, higher percentage of qualified calls

Higher booking rate per call

Clear thinking and fast decisions

Direct communication — no fluff



What we're looking for



Proven experience with Google Ads Search for local lead generation

Experience with call-driven accounts where not every caller is a qualified lead

Strong grasp of search terms, negative keyword strategy, match types, and geo and device performance

Ability to act, not just analyze



A strong plus

Experience in verticals where caller qualification is a core problem — legal, dental, home services, financial services, or similar. You don't need to know our industry. You need to have solved this type of problem before.

To apply

Send us a brief note covering:



What type of accounts you've managed and roughly how long

One call-driven account you've worked on — what the main problem was and what you did about it

Your availability for a short Zoom call



Next step

Qualified applicants will be invited to a live Zoom session where we walk through real account scenarios together. No presentations, no decks. Just a conversation about how you think.

title: Sellerpic Fashion Images Generation
description:
We need a detail-oriented virtual assistant to take over our AI image generation workflow. This is a straightforward but time-consuming task that we need handled consistently and efficiently.



As of now we plan on using SellerPic to maintain consistent quality and image types throughout the store. The platform is quite simple as it just requries downloading a reference image and then either doing "virtual try on" or "model swap" The only thing is it requries some revisions at times which is why it can be quite a time consuming task.



Our goal is to have our own generated images to avoid any competitor copying or any copyright/DMCA issues.



Your Duties:



- Logging into SellerPic and running AI image generation jobs daily

- Creating multiple variations of model images (different ethnicities, poses, backgrounds, etc.)

- Importing images onto the Shopify Product Listing through the SellerPic app

- Flagging low-quality outputs and regenerating as needed

- Following a repeatable process with minimal supervision



- Eventually there will be a import of 20-50+ products per day, requiring full time work most likely.



You would be a great fit if:



- Want to eventually be a manager in our Image Generation field and have people working under your supervision

- Are highly organized and can manage repetitive tasks without losing quality

- Have experience with AI image tools (SellerPic, Midjourney, Canva AI, or similar)

- Are comfortable following detailed written instructions

- Have a reliable internet connection and computer

- Can communicate clearly in English via chat

- Pay close attention to detail — small differences in images matter to us





Not Required, But Helps:



- Background in photo editing or graphic design

- Experience in fashion, e-commerce, or dropshipping

- Familiarity with tools like Google Drive, Notion, or Trello





Please send a message with:

1. Your experience with AI image tools (which ones, how long)

2. A quick description of a repetitive task you've handled before

3. Your availability and expected rate



Bonus: If you've used SellerPic before, mention it — it moves you to the top of the list. If you have any other experience with different AI Image platforms.



*Please add reference images so we can approve quality.

title: Python Task Reviewer (AI Quality Assurance)
description:
We’re hiring detail-oriented reviewers to evaluate AI task outputs using instructions, assets, and Python-based tests.

This is a judgment-heavy review role for people who can read Python and reason carefully. You do not need subject-matter expertise in the topic of each task. Tasks may cover unfamiliar areas, but the job is to validate the work using instructions, outputs, and tests, not to be a domain expert.



What you’ll do:

  - Review task instructions, assets, and submitted outputs

  - Read Python tests to understand what is actually being validated

  - D
 whether a task should be kept as-is, corrected, or rejected

  - Apply changes when a task is salvageable

  - Flag tasks that are ambiguous, broken, or poorly evaluated

  - Leave concise notes explaining your decision



Compensation: $15-$30 per task, depending on how much work the task needs



What we’re looking for:

  - Comfortable reading Python

  - Strong attention to detail

  - Good written English

  - Sound judgment under ambiguity

  - Able to work independently

  - Willing to do light research when a task involves an unfamiliar topic



You do NOT need:

  - Deep domain expertise in biology, mapping, or other specialized fields

  - Senior engineering experience

  - Prior experience in the exact task category



This role is a strong fit for people with backgrounds in QA, technical review, annotation, auditing, testing, or technical operations.



Important:

Accuracy matters more than outcome type. Review quality is audited, so the goal is to choose the correct outcome, not the highest-paying one.

title: Amazon Ecommerce Operations Assistant (Full-Time, Flexible Schedule)
description:
About Us:



We are a fast-growing U.S.-based e-commerce company selling products across Amazon (primary), with additional presence on Walmart and eBay.

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented tea
mber to support daily operations, starting with data and pricing tasks, with the opportunity to grow into more advanced operational responsibilities over time.

This is a long-term, full-time role for someone who wants to learn, take ownership, and grow with the company.



Core Responsibilities (Daily Work):

- Perform accurate data entry and updates in Google Sheets and internal systems

- Track and update product pricing and cost data based on supplier changes

- Maintain product data, including costs (COGS), miscellaneous costs, pricing, and expiry dates

- Ensure data accuracy and consistency across different sheets/systems and fix mismatches

- Perform regular data cleanup, organization, and accuracy checks



Operations & Growth Responsibilities:

- Assist with Amazon FBA, Walmart WFS shipment creation and basic operations tasks (training will be provided); Shipment-related work is not daily and will be introduced gradually as you gain experience. This will be a major portion of the role.

- Support basic inventory and inspection-related updates (e.g., expiry tracking, simple checks)



Working Hours:

- This is a full-time role with a flexible but structured schedule

- Work will gradually move into a split-shift schedule (Philippines time) within the following general time ranges:

     --Midday hours (approximately 10 AM – 3 PM PHT)

        --Used for coordination with the CEO and the Philippines-based team

        --Focus on data entry, pricing updates, and general operations

    --Late evening to early morning hours (approximately 10 PM – 2 AM PHT)

       --Used for alignment with U.S. daytime operations (e.g., shipments, time-sensitive tasks)

       --In the beginning, most work will be during midday hours while you are being trained and getting familiar with the systems

- Shipment-related work will be introduced gradually, and evening/night hours will increase over time

- Exact hours may vary depending on workload, but will remain within these general time ranges

- You must be comfortable working a flexible split schedule as the role evolves

- Regular communication and coordination with the CEO and team are required



To Apply – Answer All Questions Below:

1. Do you have experience with Amazon FBA shipment creation (wholesale model)?

-  If yes, briefly describe what you have done.

-  If no, just say no.

2. How many years of experience do you have with the Amazon wholesale model?

- Be specific. Do not include OA/RA or other unrelated experience.

3. What have you done inside Amazon Seller Central?

- Focus on actual tasks (pricing updates, product data, shipments, etc.)

4. Do you have experience with repricing tools (e.g., adding COGS, updating costs, managing pricing rules)?

5. Are you comfortable working a flexible split schedule (including late evening/night hours)?



Important – Read Before Applying

- You must have prior experience with the Amazon wholesale model (this role is primarily Amazon-focused)

- You should be familiar with:

   ASIN / FNSKU structure

  Product cost components (COGS, miscellaneous costs, etc.) 

  Experience with Walmart or eBay is a plus, but not required

   You must answer all application questions and include a link to your resume



IMPORTANT:

*****PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT HAVE AMAZON WHOLESALE EXPERIENCE. APPLICATIONS THAT DO NOT MEET THIS REQUIREMENT, OR THAT INCLUDE GENERIC / AI-GENERATED (CHAT-GPT) RESPONSES, WILL BE IGNORED AND MAY BE MARKED AS SPAM.*****
